programme.title: Bedazzled
programme.desc: Elliot Richards is a hapless young man consumed by unrequited love, and desperate to change his life, he makes a deal with the devil who slyly promises to do just that — for a price.

programme.title: Lars and the Real Girl
programme.desc: Lars Lindstrom is an akwardly shy young man in a small town who finally brings home the girl of his dreams to his brother and sister-in-law's home. The only problem is that she's not real - she's a sex doll.

programme.title: Toy Soldiers
programme.desc: When Colombian drug kingpin Enrique Cali (Jesse Doran) is extradited to the U.S., his son, Luis (Andrew Divoff), devises a ruthless plan to win his freedom. Rating: R

programme.title: WPT Classics
programme.desc: The final table of the Foxwoods Poker Classic has come down to four players.

programme.title: WPT Classics
programme.desc: The biggest tournament of the year explodes on the Las Vegas strip.

programme.title: WPT Classics
programme.desc: The WPT World Championship has come down to four players and one epic battle.

programme.title: World Poker Tour: London Day 1 & 2, Final Table & Final Conclusion
programme.desc: The world's top professionals and wealthiest amateurs compete for $100,000 each at Palm Beach Casino in London.

programme.title: A Day at the Beach
programme.desc: Directed in conjunction with Roman Polanski, this drama paints a cruel portrait of life in a dilapidated British seaside town, when an alcoholic disintegrates in the company of his young daughter. Peter Sellers steals scenes in a cameo performance.

programme.title: Masters Of The Universe
programme.desc: The fantastic exploits of He-Man and his arch rival, the evil Skeletor, are brought to the big screen for the first time in this live-action adventure.

programme.title: The Long Goodbye
programme.desc: Under the inimitable direction of Robert Altman, Elliot Gould stars as the laid-back, legendary private eye Philip Marlowe investigating a mysterious murder. Also stars Sterling Hayden and Nina Van Pallandt.

programme.title: Abduction
programme.desc: When Nathan (Taylor Lautner) discovers the parents who raised him aren't his real folks, he begins to uncover unsettling secrets that trigger events and leave him running for his life.

programme.title: King Solomon's Mines
programme.desc: Experience wild stunts, romance and heart-pounding excitement with Richard Chamberlain as a soldier of fortune who unwittingly gets tied into a young woman's (Sharon Stone) search for her missing father.

programme.title: Wild Card
programme.desc: Jason Statham stars as a Las Vegas bodyguard with lethal skills and a gambling problem. When he gets in trouble with the mob, he has one last play and it's all or nothing.

programme.title: Runaway Jury
programme.desc: In this suspenseful thriller, a high-priced and ruthless jury "consultant" will stop at nothing to secure a verdict on an explosive trial.

programme.title: Evil Doctor
programme.desc: Expectant parents Aubrey and Matt find their lives haunted, and their marriage tested, by an unhinged OB GYN with a mysterious past and who is after their child.

programme.title: The Package
programme.desc: A career Army sergeant is assigned to take a prisoner from Berlin to Washington, D.C. When his prisoner escapes, he finds himself in the middle of a conspiracy whose masterminds want him out of the way.

programme.title: Kids From Planet 62F
programme.desc: Four friends find an object with special powers that belongs to two alien kids from the planet 62F. Now they must race to get it back to its rightful owners, but NASA are on their tail and they will stop at nothing to get their hands on it.

programme.title: Kids From Planet 62F
programme.desc: Four friends find an object with special powers that belongs to two alien kids from the planet 62F. Now they must race to get it back to its rightful owners, but NASA are on their tail and they will stop at nothing to get their hands on it.

programme.title: Pandorum
programme.desc: Two crew members of a spaceship wake up from hypersleep to discover that all their colleagues are missing. Despite this, it appears that they are not alone. Starring: Dennis Quaid, Ben Foster, Cam Gigandet

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Sludge experiences a white-knuckle ride, climbing a mountain with an angry load.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Steve Grahame hits the mud, and Sludge's mountain mission takes a downhill slide.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Husband and wife team Nick and Jo face tough driving conditions with volatile cargo.

programme.title: Outback Truckers

programme.title: Outback Truckers

programme.title: Colonel March of Scotland Yard: The Case of the Misguided Missal
programme.desc: A 15th century prayer volume disappears from a sealed casket inside a locked safe belonging to an Oxford Don; the supernatural is suspected.

programme.title: Colonel March of Scotland Yard: The Deadly Gift
programme.desc: A barmaid receives a gift, a music box from a thief, dead ten years. But someone is soon murdered and Colonel March believes the music holds the key.

programme.title: Colonel March of Scotland Yard: The Case of the Lively Ghost
programme.desc: A phony spiritualist believes she's truly summoned a real ghost. Colonel March attends her séance to discover the identity of the spirit's killer.

programme.title: Colonel March of Scotland Yard: Death in the Dressing Room
programme.desc: Murder and blackmail culminate when a call for help during a Javenese dance is the clue that Colonel March needs to prove a faulty alibi.

programme.title: Colonel March of Scotland Yard: The New Invisible Man
programme.desc: Colonel March receives a queer complaint: a pair of disembodied gloves killed a manand there is no corpse, no blood, and no evidence of wrongdoing,

programme.title: Colonel March of Scotland Yard: Passage At Arms
programme.desc: A woman is found dead, but was it suicide or murder? A French fencing match provides the telling clue.

programme.title: Colonel March of Scotland Yard: The Sorcerer
programme.desc: A psychologist is stabbed to death in a seemingly sealed room. Inspector March must find who killed him and how did they accomplish the task.

programme.title: Child's Play (2019)
programme.desc: In this shocking re-imagining of the horror classic, single mother Karen (Aubrey Plaza) buys her son Andy (Gabriel Bateman) a seemingly innocent, AI-enhanced Buddi doll, unaware of its more sinister nature…and its true name…Chucky!

programme.title: Super Mario Bros 3 Adventures: Crimes R Us/Life's Ruff
programme.desc: King Koopa and his evil horde orchestrate the escape of an infamous criminal./The mischievous Koopa Kids Hip and Hop snatch King Windbag's magic wand and zap him and Luigi.

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: Mario and Joliet
programme.desc: In the Land of Romance, Mario, Luigi, Toad and Princess Toadstool, who had been called to the Land of Romance by a friend of Princess Toadstool, are currently trapped in a rapidly crumbling building.

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: Pirates of Koopa

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: Stars in their Eyes
programme.desc: In the depths of space, Mario, Luigi, Toad and Princess Toadstool are all aboard a yellow spaceship, which is currently traveling through a swarm of flaming meteors.

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: Love 'em and Leave 'em
programme.desc: Mario and Co arrive in Rotunda Land, which is ruled by the uptight Queen Rotunda. After being caught, Mario unintentionally gets Rotunda to drink a love potion, causing her to fall in love with him, much to his dismay.

programme.title: Super Mario Bros 3 Adventures: Reign Storm/Toddler Terrors Of Time Travel

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: Jungle Fever

programme.title: Eruption: The Countdown Begins
programme.desc: In this gripping drama, a scientist is convinced that a volcanic eruption is near. He attempts to tell others.

programme.title: Lake Geneva: The Giant Tsunami
programme.desc: In 563 AD, Geneva was destroyed by a tsunami, and it could happen again. Scientists are working to assess the danger and prepare for disaster.

programme.title: The Great Wall of Japan
programme.desc: Is Japan's 15-meter high, 500-kilometer long anti-tsunami wall worth the environmental and human impact?

programme.title: Fatal Forecast
programme.desc: Tsunamis pose an invisible threat until landfall. Scientists aim to save lives by studying their impact.

programme.title: Fatal Forecast
programme.desc: Lightning is unpredictable, powerful, and strikes with shocking frequency. How can we best protect ourselves?

programme.title: Hoarders

programme.title: Monkey
programme.desc: The evil Dogs of Plague, followers of the Great Hound of Hell, set out to destroy Monkey, Pigsy, Sandy, and Tripitaka in a battle of wit and strength.

programme.title: Monkey
programme.desc: Shotenki and his demon master Kokufki lure men from nearby villages to their casino in Ittakudo, where gambling consumes their lives and fortunes.

programme.title: Monkey
programme.desc: The Fraction Demon quizzes children about fractions and kidnaps those who answer correctly, forcing Pigsy to confront his ignorance and save them.

programme.title: Monkey
programme.desc: The pilgrims reach a land of endless daylight, caused by the vulture demon Konsei-Maoh stealing the Buddha’s sun-mirror. They must restore night to the world.

programme.title: Monkey
programme.desc: Lost and separated, Monkey and Tripitaka find a strange house in the wilderness that holds a dark secret and a sinister presence.

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: A bitter officer (David Carradine) is accused of killing the mobster who murdered his partner; guest Jackie Coogan.

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: Ironside goes to Tokyo to protect a Japanese officer (James Shigeta) who befriended him near the end of World War II.

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: The mob orders a woman (Suzanne Pleshette) to set Ironside up for murder, but she can't go through with it.

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: An ex-vaudevillian and reformed bank robber (Burgess Meredith) fumes when someone imitates his style; guest Susan Seaforth.

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: The proprietor (Pat Hingle) of a halfway house for reformed criminals steals from rich gangsters and gives the money to his charges.

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: The prime suspects in the grenade death of a Vietnam veteran are the members of the man's former squadron; guest Scott Hylands.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: Mr. Lonelyhearts
programme.desc: Cagney (Sharon Gless) and Lacey (Tyne Daly) are called in when an elderly man comes looking for his wife. But a simple missing persons case soon turns into a major bigamy and fraud case. All the while Cagney deals with a suitor.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: Conduct Unbecoming
programme.desc: Cagney (Sharon Gless) and Lacey (Tyne Daly) team together with another detective, Charles Stephens (guest star Christopher Allport), to investigate an illegal handgun operation. However, their investigation is impeded by Charles's suspension.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: I'll Be Home For Christmas
programme.desc: Cagney (Sharon Gless) and Lacey (Tyne Daly) are looking forward to an early release on Christmas Eve when a man dressed as Santa Claus (guest star Richard Masur), who has been arrested for charity fraud, escapes from his cell in the 14th precinct.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: Recreational Use
programme.desc: Cagney and Lacey team up with Sergeant Dory McKenna (guest star Barry Primus) in an investigation of a group of senior citizens terrorized by their landlord. Cagney's romance with Dory is complicated by his addiction to cocaine.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: Hopes And Dreams
programme.desc: Cagney (Sharon Gless) and Lacey (Tyne Daly) investigate a series of burglaries that occurred while all of the victims were at funerals. They become especially interested in a young teenage victim, who is bound to a wheelchair.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Greed
programme.desc: Known as “black widows,” these women kill their spouses, lovers and children for profit. Murder for them becomes a business. Their trade is murder. Their profit? Blood money.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Crimes of revenge are usually single acts of passion. A brew of hatred and restitution boils over in a manic moment of fury. Once caught, revenge killers usually display remorse and atonement.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: The path towards revenge can sometimes lead to murder. It can be quick, fiery and violent. It can also be a dish served cold, the product of a calm, calculated plot.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Sometimes, when a man and a woman unite, a terrible urge for destruction can awaken in them both. Happy couples become deadly teams, intent on one goal: murder.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: While marriage is meant to be for life, it often ends in divorce. These wives took their marriages vow seriously: "till death do us part."

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Blood ties are strong ties, sometimes strong enough to pull a person into a murderous conspiracy. When a family member wields his or her power, the result can be death.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Global Pursuit
programme.desc: In Langley, Virginia, a terrorist fired into rush hour traffic. The victims seemed randomly selected, but the motive appeared to be political, targeting employees of the Central Intelligence Agency.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Hunter's Game
programme.desc: In the 1970's and 80s, people went to Alaska looking for a fresh start, to reinvent themselves, or to disappear for a while. Some of those disappearances weren't by choice.

programme.title: The FBI Files: The Coffee Shop Murders
programme.desc: At a coffee shop in Washington, DC, three employees were shot to death. Evidence at the crime scene pointed in many different directions. Was this a hate crime, a robbery gone wrong or an act of cold-blooded vengeance?

programme.title: The FBI Files: Shattered Shield
programme.desc: In a city awash in narcotics the drug lords have all the power even over the police. Corruption in New Orleans grew like cancer, eating away at public safety and threatening to destroy the city. Crooked cops break the laws they were sworn to uphold.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Master Plan
programme.desc: Willow Springs, Illinois, seemed like any other quiet Midwestern community. But it was really one of the most corrupt places in the nation. This tiny village, nestled just outside of Chicago, was in the hip pocket of organized crime.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Nightmare Next Door
programme.desc: 13-year-old Jessie Cooper thinks Nick Hamilton is just a nice neighbor. Little does she know he's a sex offender with a penchant for adolescent girls.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Without A Trace
programme.desc: When Pam Dunn finally breaks free from her abusive relationship with Dave, things go from bad to worse as Dave relentlessly stalks and threatens her.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Dire Straits
programme.desc: A college student in Staten Island meets a deceivingly charming man who sweeps her off her feet. But the relationship turns sour when his true nature is revealed.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Power Play
programme.desc: Jane Haag rarely has time to date until she falls in love with Ron. But Jane discovers that Ron is a virtual time bomb about to explode.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Evil Intent
programme.desc: Andrew Bagby, a Canadian medical student, starts dating fellow student Shirley. But, after Andrew accepts a job in the United States, Shirley isn't ready to let him go.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Date with the Devil
programme.desc: When Ron Ruse breaks up with his controlling girlfriend, Linda, she vows to get him back at any cost. Soon, demands turn to death threats and Ron goes on the run.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Idol Worship
programme.desc: Jessica Sierra is excited to be an American Idol contestant. But when an obsessed fan starts calling non-stop, the thrill of fame turns to sheer terror when she receives disturbing threats.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Prisoner of Love
programme.desc: Katerina Brunot thinks she's met the man of her dreams in Frank Sheridan. But it all becomes a brutal nightmare when Frank turns her into his slave and frames her for a violent crime.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Playing With Fire
programme.desc: Vernetta is stalked by her abusive ex-husband, Richard, after she kicks him out of the house. When Richard threatens murder, Vernetta must face the fight of her life.

programme.title: Cold Blood: Identifying Remains
programme.desc: When a work crew uncovers a woman’s skull on a stretch of Florida highway, investigators try to determine who she is and find her killer. But it will take a bizarre discovery over a thousand miles away before the grizzly truth is finally revealed.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Family Plots
programme.desc: Every family has its secrets, and sometimes blood relations lead to bloodshed. When murder becomes a family affair, investigators must turn to forensics to uncover family plots.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Trial Of The Century
programme.desc: Forensics in the O.J. Simpson Murder Trial: Millions watched on television as the jury rendered their verdict. Orenthal James Simpson was found not guilty of murder.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Toxic Death
programme.desc: Sometimes, the cause of death does not match the scene of the crime. When an untraceable poison is used to commit murder, homicide detectives turn to forensic toxicologists to follow a killer's tracks and expose a toxic death.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Lethal Encounter
programme.desc: In most homicides, police rely on motive to pursue a murderer. But when the killer is a stranger the crime may go unsolved for years. It takes a full arsenal of forensic techniques to trace a lethal encounter.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Forsaken Trust
programme.desc: When victims of murder know their killers, they are often caught off guard. But even the best-laid plans leave traces of the forsaken trust.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Dead On Target
programme.desc: A young father-to-be is shot dead in broad daylight by a single bullet fired from afar. At the crime scene, Kenda recognizes the hallmark of a skilled sniper.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Timothy Peart’s Last Dance
programme.desc: When a teen is killed at a party, police question the guests and wonder if they’re all part of a cover-up.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Hail of Bullets
programme.desc: The murder of a young father stuns his close-knit community, but the investigation reveals a neighborly dispute turned deadly.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: A Killer Always Rings Twice
programme.desc: When 22 year-old Micki Filmore is found raped and murder in her apartment, detective Kenda focuses his investigation on her activities the previous night.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Door No. 12
programme.desc: Neighbors are stunned when close friends Louis Matos and Colleen Johnson are gunned down for no apparent reason. The case kicks into high gear when Lt Joe Kenda locates a panic-stricken eyewitness.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: The Line Goes Dead
programme.desc: When the severed head of a wife and mother is found, Lt. Joe Kenda uses forensics and interrogation to find both her body and her killer.

programme.desc: When Jon goes to an all-night magic shop./Booker is irritated by his height./Garfield attempts to defeat the evil day, Monday.

programme.desc: When Bob and Margaret have a fender-bender with a local mobster, they accidentally turn him into the police.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Bob's Burglary

programme.title: On the Case: The Disappearance of Sarah Stern
programme.desc: A car is discovered abandoned in the middle of a New Jersey bridge, with the keys inside and no driver in sight. Detectives look at three possibilities. Sarah Stern either ran way, jumped off the bridge, or was the victim of foul play.

programme.title: On the Case: Seven Minutes of Terror
programme.desc: It's two days before Christmas when two men burst into Michael Brinkman's home demanding money. Seven minutes later, the robbers are gone, Brinkman is dead from a gunshot wound to the chest, and some strange but critical evidence has been left behind.

programme.title: On the Case: A Murder at Loose Chippings
programme.desc: After a wealthy couple is found dead in their stately Virginia home, investigators are taken on a wild journey around the globe before they uncover the shocking truth.

programme.title: On the Case: Veil of Suspicion
programme.desc: A beloved husband and father is found executed in front of his home.

programme.title: On the Case: A Betrayal Concealed
programme.desc: A 17-year-old's shocking murder shatters the peace in a small town and destroys her family.

programme.title: On the Case: A Brand New Dress
programme.desc: An argument among sisters over a new dress leads a young girl to leave her house to calm down. But when she never returns, the desperate search to find her begins.

programme.title: Killer Town
programme.desc: Nicholas Brophy is excited to start his senior year of high school in Thompson, Manitoba. But, after going out to visit a friend late on a school night, he never returns.

programme.title: Killer Town
programme.desc: When a retired pro-wrestler is brutally murdered in the Manitoba hamlet of Inwood, police coordinate a massive sting operation that brings to light a savage small-town conspiracy.

programme.title: Killer Town
programme.desc: The small town of Enderby, British Columbia is shattered after well-loved residents, Derk Roelfsema and Audrey Foster-Roelfsema are found murdered in their own home.

programme.title: Killer Town
programme.desc: A Halloween murder shocks the entire community of Armstrong, B.C. With little more than a composite sketch to go on, investigators work tirelessly to bring the killer to justice.

programme.title: Killer Town
programme.desc: When hardware store clerk Sydney Loofe vanishes after an online date, the entire state of Nebraska finds themselves on high alert. Investigators race against the clock to find her, as her family clutches onto the hope that Sydney is unharmed.

programme.title: Killer Britain
programme.desc: When Janbaz Tarin married Raneem Oudeh, she didn’t know he had another family and she didn't know he had a temper. But Tarin was not a man she could walk away from, and once he set his sights on her, nobody could save her.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Jeffrey MacDonald: Fight for Truth
programme.desc: A report on the 1970 murders of U.S. Army Doctor Jeffrey MacDonald’s pregnant wife and two daughters at their Fort Bragg home. Having served 25 years in prison for the murders, MacDonald still proclaims his innocence.

programme.title: 48 Hours: A Shot in the Dark
programme.desc: Dr. Richard Illes, a heart surgeon, and his wife, Miriam, were a prominent couple in Williamsport, PA. Then, on Jan. 15, 1999, Miriam was fatally shot as she stood in front of her kitchen window. Investigators think that Richard was responsible.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Exposed
programme.desc: A report about serial killer Bill Bradford, who posed as an amateur photographer and told women he’d make them famous. Convicted of two murders, Bradford has been on death row since 1988.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Endgame
programme.desc: Janet Levine March, a wife and mother of two young children, disappeared on August 15, 1996. In December 2004, a grand jury indicted her husband, Perry, for her murder, based on circumstantial evidence.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Millionaire Manhunt
programme.desc: After a review of the circumstances surrounding the 1987 murder of Lita McClinton Sullivan and the police investigation of her husband, Jim Sullivan, the program follows Sullivan’s extradition from Thailand in 2004 and his ensuing trial for Lita’s murder.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Door No. 12
programme.desc: Neighbors are stunned when close friends Louis Matos and Colleen Johnson are gunned down for no apparent reason. The case kicks into high gear when Lt Joe Kenda locates a panic-stricken eyewitness.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Too Young To Die
programme.desc: A frenzied ambush at a hamburger stand leaves a 16-year old boy dead. Lt. Joe Kenda must cut through a mountain of rumor and innuendo in order to zero in on his prime suspect.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Victim Zero

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Pop Goes the Witness

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Stuck In A Coffin
programme.desc: In the aftermath of a five-alarm fire, first responders discover a lifeless body. When Kenda learns that the deadly blaze was no accident, he launches a manhunt.

programme.desc: Nick discovers he has high-blood pressure and looks for ways to diminish stress in his life.

programme.desc: Nick hopes to hire a golden-voiced man for voice-over work; Suzanne misplaces Gigi's expensive cashmere sweater.

programme.title: Are We There Yet?: The Cyrano Episode
programme.desc: Nick helps out a coworker by ghostwriting him love letters for a woman on a dating website who turns out to be Gigi.

programme.desc: Nick's identity is usurped by another man named Nick Kingston-Persons.

programme.title: Drop The Dead Donkey
programme.desc: The pressure becomes too much for Dave.

programme.title: Written In Blood
programme.desc: Simon Toyne travels to South London to unravel the unbelievable story of Banaz Mahmod, a woman murdered by members of her own family.

programme.title: Written In Blood
programme.desc: Simon Toyne travels to Liverpool to unravel the notorious murder of James Bulger, who was abducted and killed by two 10-year-old boys.

programme.title: Written In Blood
programme.desc: Simon Toyne travels to South Yorkshire to explore the bizarre case of a man dubbed 'The Rotherham Shoe Rapist'.

programme.title: Written In Blood
programme.desc: Simon Toyne travels to Darlington to investigate the case of Peter Chapman, dubbed 'The Facebook Killer'.

programme.title: Written In Blood
programme.desc: Simon Toyne travels to Wimbledon to delve into the famous murder of Rachel Nickell, a young mum attacked whilst walking with her little boy.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: The Nelly Crémel Case

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Mysterious Hanging On Houseboat (Aubry case)

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: A Fatal Student Night (Ste´phane Kameugne Case)
programme.desc: On December 24, 2008, the body of Stéphane Kameugne was fished out from a canal in Châlons-en-Champagne. The young man had been missing for two weeks and no one had seen him since the evening of his graduation ceremony from his engineering school

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: The Shadow of A Serial Killer: The Sophie Le Tan Case
programme.desc: On September 7, 2018, in Strasbourg, Sophie Le Tan is about to celebrate her 20th birthday with her family.

programme.title: The Case: The Escape Room From the Baumettes Prison (Pierre Folacci)
programme.desc: On June 26, 1999, in Marseilles, five prisoners of the Baumettes prison clung to the ropes thrown from a helicopter and took off.

programme.desc: The then commander of the Paris Criminal Investigation Department, looks back at the hunt for a serial rapist who was rampant in Paris.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: In 1999, hospital worker Jennifer Watkins was sexually assaulted and murdered. Two decades later, revolutionary DNA testing helps to solve this cold case.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: When a teenage couple are found dead in Montana in 1956, detectives suspect an infamous gangster might be responsible. Unfortunately it will take 65 years and new breakthroughs in technology to find the true culprit.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: In 1974, a 5-year-old girl disappears while walking to her friend's house; after 46 years, detectives are able to put the case to rest using modern DNA technology.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Pilot
programme.desc: IMF team leader Dan Briggs assembles his team for the first time. His team includes a master of disguise, a femme fatale, an electronics whiz, an incredibly strong man, and a safecracker.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Old Man Out pt. 1
programme.desc: The IMF team goes in as a circus team to rescue Anton Cardinal Vossek, who is being held in the impregnable Seravno Prison.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Old Man Out pt. 2
programme.desc: Rollin manages to avoid the guards and get to the roof but is arrested before he can rescue Vossek.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Memory
programme.desc: The IMF must undermine "the Butcher of the Balkans," Janos Karq, by having his head of security capture an agent, Sparrow, who will then incriminate Karq.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Operation Rogosh
programme.desc: Imry Rogosh is a mass murderer who kills to foment political upheaval. He is targeting Los Angeles, so the IMF knocks him out in a car accident.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Viva la Vegas
programme.desc: 1974 death-defying Zig Zag magic sword box, an ultra-rare 1910 poster of the infamous magician Chung Ling Soo, an 1800s naval cane sword and century-old Metlach German beer steins.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Quadzilla Attacks!
programme.desc: Extreme Quadzilla ATV, the fastest 4 wheeler ever; a 1910s Remington Derringer and an 1880s Palm Squeezer pistol; revolutionary 1800s Western Electric telephone with a crank dial.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Disco and Dice
programme.desc: 1978 Williams Disco pinball machine; 1898 dice popper gambling device; talking 1990s bar top breathalyzer; deadly fishing harpoon.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Once a Pawn a Time
programme.desc: Ton and Allen discover that owning a pawn shop is way more trouble than they expected. With bills stacking up, even an antique ammo collection and some classic football helmets may not be enough to put the guys in the black.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Rock-et to Me!
programme.desc: Ton and Allen end up in a turf war at a Hollywood auction and at odds with each other over whether to gamble on what could be an antique slot machine. Allen attempts to fly a jetpack.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Big Easy Money
programme.desc: Allen & Ton head to New Orleans in search of easy money, but instead encounter some bayou bidders with big-time bucks! They discover a pair of early 19th-century dueling pistols & a vintage airboat fitted with a turbine engine!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Allen vs. Ton
programme.desc: When Ton and Allen find themselves bidding against each other at an auction, the former partners battle it out in an epic showdown that leaves the fate of the pawnshop and their friendship in question.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Great American Cashtime
programme.desc: Rare 1950s Master Pitch baseball machine; 1980s Jaws of Life tool used by rescuers to pry open cars.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Off the Deep End
programme.desc: Ton and Allen quarrel over bidding strategy at a rare auction on Catalina Island and must race against the clock to unload a one man submersible that could be worth big money… if they can make it work.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Fake Punt Payoff
programme.desc: Ton and Allen contend with a large crowd of inexperienced auction-buyers at a huge storage container auction in Pasadena. They find a small fleet of Segway personal transporters and an enormous custom-made shotgun.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Friends in Hawaii Places
programme.desc: Allen &Ton enlist an assistant, Carolyn, and Allen's Hawaiian buddy, Junior, to help them battle local buyers. The guys find a WWII-era motor scooter and a stash of antique Polynesian tattoo tools that get used on Ton!

programme.desc: Watch a couple speculate about the life of a judge who now haunts their home.

programme.title: A Haunting: Demons Never Die

programme.title: A Haunting: The Possessed
programme.desc: Mary Vogel, a spiritual counselor for ten years, has a run in with a demonic force.

programme.title: A Haunting: Demon Unearthed

programme.title: A Haunting: House Of Sorrows
programme.desc: In 2012, Darrin and Jamie Shriver move into a home with tragic history. Darrin unwittingly invites dark entities back into the home threatening the safety of his wife and new baby. Paranormal investigators determine a demonic entity is in the home.

programme.title: A Haunting: Monster in the Apartment
programme.desc: A ghost attacks Morgan Knudsen in order to drive her out and get to her friend Bob.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: When US marine veteran Darrell Blagg is found shot dead outside his New Mexico home, a lucky break leads detectives to suspect his wife has links to the murderer.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: After a hard-working Virginia couple is brutally murdered on the eve of their anniversary, the ensuing investigation goes cold until detectives find the most unlikely of suspects.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: When a single mother with a history of heart problems is found dead, detectives assume she died of natural causes. But as the investigation deepens, detectives begin to believe foul play was involved.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: Investigators expose the truth about what happened to Shanann Watts and her two daughters at the hands of a seemingly devoted husband and father in a headline-making case.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: After authorities finally identify the prolific Green River Killer, a cat-and-mouse game ensues to get inside his mind and have him lead them to the remains of other missing women.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 5

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: Lois Riess
programme.desc: Lois and David Riess were grandparents and business owners. Lois was also a gambling addict who would do anything to feed her habit. David became the first victim of a murderous rampage that earned Lois the title of America’s most wanted grandmother.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: Keland Hill
programme.desc: Tiffany and Keland Hill were military veterans with a shining service history. But while Tiffany still lived to serve, Keland lived to control, stalk and terrorise his wife. He was extremely violent, but no one predicted his final act of brutality.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: Ricardo Godinho
programme.desc: Aliny and Ricardo Godinho had four children and a relationship history that spanned 17 years. While Aliny put her kids at the centre of everything she did, for Ricardo they were a morbid obsession, and one that would lead to a shocking, brutal crime.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: Ramanodge Unmathallegadoo
programme.desc: At the age of 16, Sana Muhammad had an arranged marriage to Ramanodge Unmathallegadoo, a man almost twice her age. She managed to escape the unhappy relationship and found new love, but Ramanodge decided she would never get to enjoy her new life.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: Frances Hall
programme.desc: When Frances Araiza met Bill Hall Jr, he was a 16 year old with big ideas. Fast forward three decades and they were grandparents with a multi-million dollar empire. But behind closed doors, their marriage story was heading for an explosive finale.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: Faria Khan
programme.desc: After leaving an arranged marriage she claimed was abusive, Faria Khan could have moved on. But she wouldn’t be satisfied until estranged husband Nawajid was dead. And she knew exactly who to ask to help her.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Frenzy
programme.desc: Three bodies are found in a house, arms tied behind their backs. Stab wounds to the neck. Bloody footprints in the hall. A killing spree that leaves a woman, her boyfriend and a church deacon dead.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Good Doctor
programme.desc: A single mother in Saskatchewan visits a hospital in the midst of a panic attack. Her doctor sedates her. Then, she is certain, he rapes her.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Monster of Miramichi
programme.desc: Firemen are called to a blaze and discover two sisters, one dead and the other on death's door. Detectives learn that a man snuck in and brutally sexually assaulted the sisters before setting fire to the house.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Vanished
programme.desc: A small town public school teacher fails to arrive for work for the first time in thirty years, leaving an empty house and a baffled community.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Hostage
programme.desc: A man robs an armoured car at gunpoint and holds a massage parlor worker hostage. As police investigate, they find startling links to a series of robberies, all taking place during the Christmas season.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Lone Wolf
programme.desc: Two murders of mothers in their own homes send shock-waves through a normally quiet and friendly town where everybody leaves their doors unlocked. The crimes go unsolved until twenty-eight years later.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Secret Life
programme.desc: In Calgary, Alberta, a beautiful Ethiopian woman is found brutally strangled. The victim’s husband seems genuinely distraught over his wife’s death, but there is something strangely suspicious about him.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Faith Healer
programme.desc: A trucker at a roadside rest station discovers the fully clothed body of a dead East Indian woman.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Head in a Bucket
programme.desc: A woman is told by a friend that she was a passenger in a car where she was confronted with a guy's head in a bucket.

programme.title: Someone They Knew
programme.desc: When a well-respected psychiatrist and his adult son are killed as they sleep, police are baffled by the apparent randomness-until an arrest in an unrelated crime leads them to the least likely of suspects.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model: Episode 7
programme.desc: The contestants meet TV presenter Laura Whitmore for a posing challenge in Carnaby Street under the pouring rain while passersby vote on their favorite contestants.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model: Episode 8

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model: Episode 9
programme.desc: The contestants meet journalist Gordon Smart and participate in a press challenge where they write a 60-second skit regarding their opinions of the other contestants, which they later present in front of the camera.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model: Episode 10

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model: Episode 11

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Family Vacation: Where's the Beach?

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan makes the Germans think that Schultz has ESP to get them to move their anti-aircraft defenses.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan's latest escapee is a chimp from the local zoo who helps them deliver a radio part to the underground.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: A German truck carrying an experimental jet fuel is the latest target for Hogan and his men. But when all efforts to sabotage the shipment fail, Carter gets down to business with the remaining weaponry at hand - a bow and arrow.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: How can Hogan and his crew keep Sgt. Schultz from being transferred to the Russian Front?

programme.desc: To his traditional bounty hunting tools of confidential informants, canvassing, and silver-tongued subterfuge the world's greatest bounty hunter has added Facebook! A word to the wise for those on the run-post at your own peril, the Dog is watching!

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: A Family Affair
programme.desc: Dog likes to say, "The apple doesn't fall far from the tree," and this is a hunt where that is true. So will Dog be able to use one family member's troubled ways to catch another one in trouble with the law?

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Training Day

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Photo Op

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: A House Divided

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: All Grown Up

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Higher Power

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: MYSTERIES OF HIDDEN ROOMS
programme.desc: Throughout history, humanity has been captivated by hidden places—rooms, passages, and chambers. Whether for escape or sinister motives, these ten notable hidden spaces span the ages, revealing intrigue and mystery.

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: SUPRESSED INVENTIONS IN HISTORY
programme.desc: Explore lost or suppressed inventions from history, some skeptical, others mysterious. Despite doubts, many are useful today. Stay open-minded as we delve into these intriguing relics.

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: EXTRA TERRESTRIAL
programme.desc: Top 10 Secrets and Mysteries explores extraterrestrial phenomena like ship and aircraft vanishings, Area 51, close encounters, classified projects.

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: MYSTERIOUS CREATURES
programme.desc: Top 10 Secrets and Mysteries examines mysterious creatures that may live in Earth including the chupacabra, the Loch Ness Monster, the thunderbird,) the yeti or Bigfoot.

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: SACRED BUILDINGS
programme.desc: Top 10 Secrets and Mysteries looks at the sacred places and buildings of ancient and medieval people including the Great Pyramid of Giza, Chartres Cathedral, Derinkuyu Underground City, Santiago de Compostela Catherdral.

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: SUPERNATURAL ABILITIES
programme.desc: Top 10 Secrets and Mysteries looks at supernatural abilities including exceptional endurance in fire-walking and the festival of penitence, telepathy, shamans, mysterious recoveries from illness, clairvoyance.

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: UNEXPLAINED MESSAGES
programme.desc: Top 10 Secrets and Mysteries looks at mysterious unexplained messages from the past including the Nazca Lines, the Voynich Manuscript, the Flower of Life, Puma Punku, Leonardo Da Vinci's paintings.

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: PARANORMAL ACTIVITIES
programme.desc: Top 10 Secrets and Mysteries looks at paranormal activities including apparitions and ghosts, the dark day mystery, Marian Apparitions, curses, warnings from beyond, spontaneous combustion.

programme.title: Myth Hunters
programme.desc: It’s one of the most powerful and enduring myths ever created. The Garden of Eden. One maverick scholar, Dr Juris Zarins sets out to prove its existence.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: In 2007, Meredith Kercher is murdered in Italy. Amanda Knox and Raffaele Sollecito are initially convicted but later exonerated. Rudy Guede is convicted. The Kercher family still seeks justice.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: In 1995 Paris, Guy Georges, a serial killer, was linked to multiple murders through DNA and later confessed in court. He was sentenced to life in prison, leading to the establishment of a DNA database for offenders in France.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: In 1990, Danny Rolling killed five students in Gainesville, Florida. He confessed to the crimes, pleaded guilty to avoid the death penalty, but was ultimately sentenced to death and executed 16 years later.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: In September 1987, Simon Dale is murdered. His ex-wife, Susan Wilberforce, is acquitted of the crime but later convicted of fraud and sentenced to seven years. The murder remains unsolved.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: In February 1977, Australian heiress Janie Shepherd vanishes in London. David Lashley, a convicted rapist, later confesses to her murder in prison. In 1990, he is convicted based on this confession and sentenced to life.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: On December 7, 1993, Colin Ferguson killed six and injured nineteen in the Long Island Railroad Massacre. Defending himself at trial, he bizarrely questioned his own victims and was sentenced to over 300 years in prison.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: In 2006, Nina Sharanova vanished in Oakland. Her ex-husband, Hans Reiser, was convicted of her murder after their son’s testimony and leading police to her body. Reiser is now appealing the conviction.

programme.title: Greatest Crimes of All Time: Hostage-Takers
programme.desc: For the police, hostage crises are the worst things that can happen. Under pressure from the public and the media, investigators must make snap decisions that mean the difference between life and death.

programme.title: Naked Science: The Big Bang - The First Three Seconds
programme.desc: 13.7 billion years ago there was absolutely nothing. No space, no time, and no matter. Naked Science follows the first three seconds of creation when a speck of light appeared from nothing and rapidly expanded into an enormous Universe.

programme.title: Naked Science: Magnetic Earth
programme.desc: The Earth hurtles through space protected by an invisible force field, known as a magnetosphere.

programme.title: Naked Science: Diamonds
programme.desc: Naked Science follows the story of a diamond from the creation of carbon inside the heart of a dying sun, through to the cutting of a diamond mine in South Africa.

programme.title: Naked Science: Jupiter
programme.desc: By far the largest planet, 1300 times the size of Earth, it’s a world so enormous it could swallow every planet and moon in the solar system and still have room to spare.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: Down Mexico Way

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: Terry Loves Superheros

programme.title: Trajectory - Milestones in Space Exploration
programme.desc: Project Gemini: Docking and EVA - In the final phase of the Gemini program NASA struggles with docking and spacewalks. Curiosity Roving Mars - On the surface of Mars the Curiosity rover is changing the way we think about the red planet.

programme.title: Trajectory - Milestones in Space Exploration
programme.desc: The Apollo Program Begins - At the very beginning of NASA's moon project things go wrong. Caves - ESA's special training program for astronauts. Planck - Mapping the cosmic microwave background radiation.

programme.title: Trajectory - Milestones in Space Exploration
programme.desc: Rebuilding Project Apollo - After the Apollo 1 disaster NASA resumes manned space flight. Orbiting Carbon Observatory 2 - Monitoring the Earth's Co2 levels in unprecedented detail. Zero Gravity Training - Parabolic flights.

programme.title: Trajectory - Milestones in Space Exploration
programme.desc: Beyond Earth Orbit - The Apollo program takes bold new steps. IXV Re-entry Vehicle - Europe is working to perfect a re-entry vehicle. Galileo Satellites Lost and Found - Navigation satellites go into incorrect orbit.

programme.title: Trajectory - Milestones in Space Exploration
programme.desc: To the Moon - The Apollo program achieves its major objective. Dragon, Falcon and Spacex - New directions in re-usable spacecraft. Gaia- Mapping our galaxy in unprecedented detail.

programme.title: Trajectory - Milestones in Space Exploration
programme.desc: The Beginning of the End - After the first Moon landing the Apollo science program was about to start in earnest but people were losing interest. Apollo Gets Complicated - New technology is added that extends the reach of the Apollo program.

programme.title: Trajectory - Milestones in Space Exploration
programme.desc: The Shuttle Program - The first re-useable spacecraft. The Challenger Disaster - Pressing launch schedules lead to carelessness and the loss of the Challenger. Return to Space - A re-designed shuttle is back in space with a redefined role.

programme.title: Trajectory - Milestones in Space Exploration
programme.desc: The Space Shuttle Matures - The Space Transportation System changes the nature of orbital missions. Complex Construction in Space - Confidence in the shuttle begins to return and engineers for get the lessons of the past.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Magic Caboose - Arts

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends

programme.desc: When Krang realizes the Technodrome is running low on liquid nitrogen, its main source of fuel, he discovers that a formula exists in Dimension Z which transmutes crude oil, easily available on Earth, into liquid nitrogen.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Shredderville

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Blood ties are strong ties, sometimes strong enough to pull a person into a murderous conspiracy. When a family member wields his or her power, the result can be death.

programme.title: Deadly Women

programme.title: Psychic Witness
programme.desc: Police suspect foul play when an Oregon mother vanishes. In California, a woman does not return home after a night out. Psychics use their gifts to unravel mysteries.

programme.title: Psychic Witness
programme.desc: The murder of an elderly couple shocks a small New York town. An Ohio family searches for a missing woman.Two psychics saw everything that happened. Noreen Renier senses the killer is lying about his alibi. Georgia Rudolph leads police to the body.

programme.title: Psychic Witness
programme.desc: An Arkansas teen has been abducted. In California, a young man vanishes, leaving no clues. Psychics help both families find answers. When both cases grow bleak, the families contact psychics Carol Pate and Rosemarie Kerr to help find their loved ones.

programme.title: Psychic Witness
programme.desc: A California man finds his elderly neighbors murdered in their own home. In Ohio, police investigate a bloody attack but cannot find the victim. A pair of psychics join in to help.

programme.desc: Fredrik lands a building with $400 million dollars in potential sales, but his boss thinks he may have over-promised in order to get it; Ryan juggles two sellers; Steve gets a list of demands from a broker and makes one of his own.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York
programme.desc: In the hopes of selling a $20 million unit in his new mega-tower, Fredrik calls on everyone he knows, including agent Michael Lorber; Ryan goes toe-to-toe with his buyer's wingman, social media influencer The Fat Jewish.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York
programme.desc: When Ryan lands a $25 million dollar listing in Tribeca, he calls upon his most intense team member for help; in Chelsea, Steve's listing for his friend, Sam, continues to have problems, but it's nothing compared to his dating life.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York
programme.desc: When a seller demands Ryan remove his team member from a $25 million Tribeca listing, he hatches a plan that includes a secret twist; Steve lands an opportunity to sell an amazing $18 million SoHo penthouse; Fredrik and Ryan reconnect with Luis.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York
programme.desc: Fredrik begins questioning the effects of gentrification as he sells his $225 million development in the historic East Village; Ryan starts to doubt his sales strategy; Steve's co-lister tests his patience, nerves and even his bicycling skills.

programme.title: Mayday Air Disaster
programme.desc: DHL A300's crew battles to land for 16 min at Baghdad's airport without hydraulics during a routine mail run.

programme.title: Mayday Air Disaster
programme.desc: Minutes after take off from Tokyo en route to Osaka, the tailfin blows off the huge Boeing 747. The plane is now out of control.

programme.title: Mayday Air Disaster
programme.desc: The three man crew of FedEx 705 are just finishing their climb out from Memphis when the attack starts.

programme.title: Mayday Air Disaster
programme.desc: During a sea battle, a military radar operator mistakenly identifies an approaching civilian aircraft as a hostile F-14.

programme.title: Mayday Air Disaster
programme.desc: An explosion jolts the pilots of PA 434. A bomb has gone off and there’s extensive damage to the plane.

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun
programme.desc: A family race to open their dream bar but will the bank manager save the day? Two brand new bed & breakfast owners welcome their first guests in the French Dordogne. And can the newest fisherman on the Costa del Sol impress his first customers?

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun
programme.desc: One expat fisherman has a big catch in Cape Verde, another comes back empty handed in Spain. Two French bed & breakfast hosts receive their first customer review, and a Spanish boutique hotel ventures into unchartered waters.

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun
programme.desc: Can Steve and his mother-in-law impress customers with delicious food at their Spanish bar? Boutique hotel owners Ray and Yvonne hold their very first wedding, and a couple of ex-actors have plans to bring drama to Bordeaux.

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun
programme.desc: Novice bed & breakfast owners receive crucial feedback from their final guests of the season. Will weddings make or break a Spanish bed & breakfast, and can the Costa’s newest fisherman make his dream a reality?

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun
programme.desc: Can a family from North Yorkshire run a business in the middle of Europe’s only desert? A classic car fan tries to persuade his reluctant wife that they should sell car spare parts in France. Two expats try to launch a new dive centre in Marbella.

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: It's a Headless Horse, Man / Voyage to the Bottom of the Deep
programme.desc: McGee is thrilled when he wins a mounted horse head.

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: McGee's First Flush / House of Ear Wax
programme.desc: Two of McGee and Suzi's former pets "Ocean Apes" return for vengeance and are mutated in all kinds of horrible ways! Squirt's chronic ear wax issues escalate as his giant ball of wax seems to take on a mind of its own.

programme.title: Kung Fu Dino Posse
programme.desc: To further his research into alligator feeding patterns, Edgar decides to do some observing at the alligator habitat at the Megalopolis Zoo. During the observation, the usually docile alligators start to behave violently when they see Kane.

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Terror form the Toybox / Slimeball Run
programme.desc: Buttsquat's Teddy Bear washes up at Camp Lakebottom and hypnotizes the Bottom Dwellers.

programme.title: Magi-Nation
programme.desc: When the Final Hyren quest lands the kids in Bograth, they discover the strange, swamp-laden realm. The rampant void energy poisoning the swamp has changed the Bograthians - and their Guardian Hyren - into mutated, rat-like creatures.

programme.title: Kung Fu Dino Posse
programme.desc: Jet wakes up on the floor of the museum one day to find it over-run by Skor and his Links. On top of that, Kane, Chow, and Lucy seemed to have joined forces with Skor, as they obey his every command. What happened?

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: The Day Squirt Stood Still / Anti Gravity
programme.desc: The campers track down a UFO inhabited by an alien from the planet Squipiter.

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Cabin Fever / It's a Horrible Life
programme.desc: While lost in the woods, McGee, Gretchen, Squirt and Sawyer discover a creepy cabin.

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Fright Club / Bottomdome
programme.desc: The campers discover an enchanted flashlight.

programme.title: Kung Fu Dino Posse
programme.desc: Hyperactive Jet accidentally breaks the Dino Posse’s high-tech gem finder, just as it locates a new powerful gem, apparently embedded in some kind of household object. The team tries to come up with other high-tech methods of tracking the stone.

programme.title: Street Sharks
programme.desc: Responding to an urgent fan letter from a little boy who's country has been taken over by an evil dictator, Bends and the Sharks travel to "Chernozem" to free the boy's dad and topple the evil dictator.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: BJ is surprised to learn that “The Land of Mother Goose” truly exists. Baby Bop catches Barney, BJ, and Riff wrapping a mysterious present in the caboose, she just can’t wait to see what it is.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: A Picture of Friendship
programme.desc: After a brief misunderstanding, BJ realizes he has many friends. He enjoys a day playing with Barney and the children.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: A-Counting We Will Go!
programme.desc: Barney and the kids help Baby Bop count to ten by playing games, and visiting a Make-Believe Market.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Ryan tries to be just like Barney but soon learns that he is special when he's being himself! Barney explains to Baby Bop that the word "no" can help you avoid making mistakes or getting hurt.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: A Parade of Bikes
programme.desc: It's the day of the bike parade. But Nick has had a bike accident that leaves his bike in need of repair by Mr. Boyd. Barney helps Baby Bop and the children learn all about bicycles—and that they are a wonderful way to exercise and have fun.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: This Way In, This Way Out!
programme.desc: Angela is in the park to release her turtle after observing him with her classmates in school. Barney and the children discuss the meaning of in and out after observing the turtle going in and out of his shell.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Bunches of Boxes!
programme.desc: A day of imaginative play and fun for Barney and his young friends is kicked off by the arrival of a variety of boxes from the "Enjoy-Your-Toys Company." Surprisingly, every box is empty!

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Everybody's Got Feelings
programme.desc: Barney helps Baby Bop and BJ learn that everyone has feelings—happy, sad, angry—and sometimes all those feelings can be experienced in just one day.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Riffs Musical Zoo - Boats
programme.desc: Everyone is excited about an upcoming trip to the zoo. When the trip is postponed, Riff decides to create a musical zoo. He gathers instruments that sound like real animals. Everyone has a wonderful time at Riff's musical zoo.

programme.desc: Plotting revenge, Baxter, who has been turned into a fly-like creature, delivers a borellium crystal to Krang and Shredder whose Technodrome is low in power.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Big Ripoff
programme.desc: The Technodrome is perilously close to running out of power as it teeters on the edge of a crumbling lava cliff deep within the bowels of the Earth.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Big Break-In
programme.desc: Krang and Shredder get the Technodrome rolling again and raise it to the centre of the Earth.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Big Blow-Out
programme.desc: Krang and Shredder raise the Technodrome to the surface and seize unlimited energy. The Turtles and the World face their darkest hour.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Plan Six from Outer Space
programme.desc: The Turtles launch the missile from the sewers positioned under the Technodrome. It transports Bebop, Rocksteady, Krang and Shredder back to Dimension X but explodes on impact; they survive.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Turtles of the Jungle
programme.desc: Donatello's idol, inventor mad-scientist Professor Willard creates the Molecular Intensifier, a machine to control growth of living things.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Michelangelo Toys Around
programme.desc: Michelangelo dreams he's being attacked by Tyranno-toys. He wakes up to hear April announcing the Toy Fair opening. Determined to go, Michelangelo disguises himself as a Turtle toy.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Peking Turtles
programme.desc: April O'Neil reports from the Uptown Museum about a display of artifacts from the 2000-year-old Ying Dynasty of China. The marble warriors were built to protect the world's largest pearl from being stolen from the Emperor's collection of jewels.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Shredder's Mother
programme.desc: The earth is experiencing global warming and Krang and Shredder threaten to expose it to increased catastrophic weather conditions.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Four Turtles and A Baby
programme.desc: The Neutrinos are attacked and their leaders, Zenter and Grizzla, are seized by Krang, Shredder and General Traag.

programme.title: Total Drama Island
programme.desc: The teams are handcuffed together.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: The Lemmings have a grand old time tearing down their Kapla block buildings, which they rebuild just as fast. Grizzly remarks that the she-bear he's in love with is impressed by the Lemmings' construction and makes believe that it's his work of art.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: The Lemmings draw inspiration from lessons they find in a martial arts book and start breaking every wooden object they can get their hands on into two. When Grizzy tries to stop them, they go on to the next lesson and get him in a judo hold.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzy dreams that he's a valiant knight who has delivered his beloved. As he is about to take her in his arms, he is woken by the Lemmings who have chosen this day to blast music.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzy stands in front of the pantry, desperate. The stock of chocolate spread is completely depleted. He realises that the Lemmings are making some themselves, following a complicated recipe.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: Inspired by a magazine with a jewellery ad showing a man offering a diamond to a woman, Grizzly imagines himself offering the ranger's engagement ring to his beloved she-bear.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: When he accidentally sticks a computer microprocessor to his temple, Grizzy is transformed into an exceptionally intelligent being capable of predicting events to come far in advance.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: The Lemmings prepare a dream afternoon snack with the last jar of chocolate spread in the cupboard. Tough luck, Grizzy is coming. Caught off guard, the Lemmings hide the jar in a teddy bear-pyjama case to slip away without arousing suspicion.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzy gleefully discovers that he can print images taken with the ranger's camera as it's connected to a state-of-the-art printer. He decides to frame himself, but when the time comes to print his portrait, there's no more paper in the printer.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: A van pulls up to the ranger's cabin to deliver a full crate of jars of chocolate spread. While Grizzy and the Lemmings fight over a wrecking bar to open it, someone steals the crate.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: As usual, Grizzly picks the door of the Ranger's log cabin to come in and make himself comfortable, but this time it's impossible to enter. The Lemmings have requisitioned the cabin for a party and barricaded themselves inside.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: The Lemmings have got their hands on some white beans which have very strange properties, when mixed with soda anyone who eats them turns into a bouncing ball. Grizzy realises that if he wants to have a nap, he must get rid of the magic beans.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzly wants to get rid of the old piano in the garage at any cost, for the Lemmings love using it to make a dissonant racket. But when he notices a she-bear he's in love with likes the melody of Fur Elise, he decides to learn the piece.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: The Lemmings inherit a crate that fell off a Canadian army convoy transporting ultra-secret material. The case inside the crate emits a sort of laser beam that divides objects into multiple miniaturised versions of themselves.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: Near the supermarket, a machine hands out surprise eggs in exchange for a coin. Amongst the lots to be won, there is a super firework rocket the Lemmings dream of.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: At the Ranger's home, Grizzy finds a high-tech gadget that enables you to learn anything within seconds thanks to electrodes hooked to the brain, meaning that he can become the perfect bear.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: An old metal box found by chance in a recess of a cliff brings back childhood memories for Grizzy and the Lemmings.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzy struggles to watch a documentary on salmon fish, nice and comfy on the sofa, as the Lemmings play chemistry novices with a fun experiment box.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzy's TV remote control is stolen by a partridge who collects high-tech objects in his nest perched high up in a tree. This is a case of absolute urgency.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzy has got it into his head to offer a butterfly to the bear he's in love with. But the Lemmings fight with him over the rare specimens he's spotted.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: The Lemmings have discovered an addictive new game based on the astonishing bouncing properties of the ranger's new running shoes.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzy babysits for the she-bear he has a crush on. There's no question of Grizzy tripping up, as he has no intention of taking any risks, but he hasn't reckoned on the Lemmings.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: Unwilling to share the food both he and the Lemmings are wild about, Grizzy locks it up inside the ranger's brand new and apparently burglar-proof safe.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzy is impressed by the TV show of a magician who transforms a partridge into a bouquet of flowers. To get rid of the Lemmings once and for all, for they exasperate him with their incessant games, Grizzy tries the magic trick on them.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzy's TV remote control is stolen by a partridge who collects high-tech objects. This is a case of absolute urgency. Grizzy has no other choice but to requisition the Lemmings' propulsion game to recover his possession.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: A voice trumpet rises and makes the sound of a whistle; Tinky Winky laughs when he hears the sound. The Tubbies watch some children who march and twirl their batons to music.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Tinky Winky makes some adjustments on the switch panel. He joins the other Tubbies to watch a little girl exploring a harp and making music.

programme.title: Teletubbies

programme.title: Monkey

programme.title: Monkey

programme.title: Monkey
programme.desc: When the pilgrims bathe in a mysterious pool, they turn into babies. Tripitaka learns it’s the Fountain of Youth, guarded by the Spirits of Time Passed.

programme.title: Monkey
programme.desc: Starving and lost, the pilgrims find a quiet town with hidden dangers. They learn that not all demons are enemies, nor all humans pure.

programme.title: Monkey
programme.desc: Chen-Gold, the richest man alive, seeks a husband for his daughter while greed consumes him. Obsessed with wealth, he turns himself to gold.

programme.title: Monkey
programme.desc: Yung-Hu, a lovesick goblin, falls for a married woman, I-Ling. The pilgrims teach them about love, faith, and the path toward enlightenment.

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: The slain member of a famous string quartet recorded a prediction of his death months earlier; guest Tim Matheson.

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: Only experimental spinal surgery can save sniper victim Brown from paralysis; guests Vic Morrow, E.G. Marshall.

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: Ironside takes a course in dog training to learn why two previously reliable canines failed to stop jewel thieves; guest Anthony Zerbe.

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: A TV talk-show host (James Gregory) cooperates in a plan to flush out a girl's murderer.

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: Law-school graduate Mark must decide between opening a practice or working as a public defender; guest Eugene Roche.

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: A Japanese ideogram provides the key to finding a package stolen from a woman (Sian Barbara Allen) after her father's death.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: Date Rape
programme.desc: Cagney and Lacey are at odds over the investigation of a rape case. Cagney sides with the male investigators who feel the woman is at fault, while Lacey sides with the woman. Things become more complicated when the woman's past is used against her.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: Burn-Out
programme.desc: When Lacey's vacation is temporarily postponed, she becomes overwhelmed with her responsibilities as a cop, wife, and mother. Meanwhile, Cagney goes undercover as a nun to investigate drugs that have gone missing from a hospital.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: Chop Shop
programme.desc: Detective Victor Isbecki's cover is blown during an investigation of a dangerous car theft ring and he becomes a hostage. Cagney and Lacey must work to help save him while coming to terms with their own failures in the investigation.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: Let Them Eat Pretzels
programme.desc: Cagney and Lacey find what should be a simple hit-and-run accident becomes deeply complicated when the son of a diplomat becomes involved. The team must figure out how to arrest the son, while the father attempts to stop them.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: The Gang's All There
programme.desc: While out at a bar celebrating Petrie's promotion, the 14th precinct is robbed of their guns, shields, and possessions. The team then works furiously to find the perpetrators after they become the laughing stock of the entire NYPD.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: These women would stop at nothing to get their hands on the cash they needed. From husbands to strangers to other people’s babies, they spilt blood for money.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: The mind of a female killer is shaped by a complex cocktail of influences. Do people become that way, driven by horrendous events in their lives? Or are some killers born bad?

programme.title: Deadly Women: Love to Death
programme.desc: Love and money are a beautiful marriage, for the lucky ones they create a life of happiness and ease. Unless the love is of money, the bride is a killer, and the groom their victim.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Psychopathic killers lurk in society, mostly acting alone. Sometimes fate brings them into contact with another person who shares their cold power to kill.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Secrets and Lies
programme.desc: Behind their friendly smiles, deadly women hide histories of bloodshed and murder.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Obsession
programme.desc: Deciphering what causes minds to corkscrew out of control is the complex work of the criminal profiler. Obsessions can take many forms: beauty, devotion, ego and power.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Millionaire Murder
programme.desc: A businessman went to Florida to make one last deal before he retired-he never returned home to his millions. Authorities examined who was closest to him and who stood to gain from his disappearance. But this time conventional rules didn't apply.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Cat and Mouse
programme.desc: He was a predator, abducting girls and young women from their own front yards in broad daylight. He was a sadist: phoning one victim's family, taunting them, boosting then dashing their hope, and he wouldn't stop until we stopped him.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Evil Intent
programme.desc: Drops of blood and a torn screen were all that's left to tell authorities what happened to a woman in Indiana. The 21 yr. old victim was taken from her home on a spring morning. She appeared to have no real enemies, there was no clear motive.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Deadly Trail
programme.desc: The disappearance of young women triggered a search that spanned the Pacific Northwest. A massive media campaign failed to locate the drifter, who first charmed then killed them. As investigators followed his trail, he always stayed one step ahead.

programme.title: Cold Blood: Close to Home
programme.desc: A fifteen-year-old girl goes to deliver a letter for her parents. Only a few hours later, she is found viciously murdered and left under a slide in a park, only 120 yards from her home. Ansley Common, in Nuneaton, Warwickshire is a close-knit village.

programme.title: Cold Blood: California Girl Gone

programme.title: Cold Blood: Nightmare in Nashville

programme.desc: The mother of two teenaged girls is found dead in her bathtub. The coroner declares it an accidental death, but a year later, new information prompt the police to reopen the case.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Raw Greed

programme.title: The New Detectives: Deadly Target

programme.title: The New Detectives: Deadly Aim

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Brew-Phoria
programme.desc: Ton and Allen go all in for an electric car, but with the batteries missing, a pricey refurb is their only shot at a profit. Will a home brewing system and high-end air rifles help soften the blow, or will they take a big loss?

programme.title: Auction Hunters: You Got Served
programme.desc: After a crushing defeat, the guys leave an auction empty handed and scramble to find new merchandise at a yard sale. But questionable antique tennis rackets and an ancient special effects box may not earn them a cent.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Hidden Hot Wheels
programme.desc: Ton and Allen challenge a big time auction buyer on his home turf. The guys uncover a 1969 Chevelle Malibu muscle car and a single-shot pistol designed to aid Allied resistance fighters during WWII.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Hula Moola

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Night of the Digging Dead

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Rock and Roll

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Weapons of Past Destruction
programme.desc: Knowing that Hollywood auctions are hit-and-miss, Allen and Ton buy inexpensive lockers that contain a polygraph machine, a samurai sword and a pair of Civil War shotguns.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Real Thing

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Hook, Line & Printer

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Machine Gun Ton
