programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: The Bilderbergs
programme.desc: A glimpse backstage at the highly secretive annual gathering of the world's richest and most powerful movers and shakers.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: Mokele Mbembe
programme.desc: Mokele Mbembe means able to stem the flow of rivers. The Pygmies there say they have encountered just such a creature and according to their descriptions, this behemoth is a dead ringer for an Apotosaurus.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: Richard investigates claims that the supposed mastermind behind the 9/11 terrorist attacks and leader of the Al Qaeda terrorist cell remained a CIA asset until his death.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: Are we really running out of oil, or does the government and Big Oil just want us to think we are? Two proponents of the abiotic oil theory argue that oil is not a fossil fuel and actually replenishes itself deep within the earth.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: Was Presidential hopeful, Robert F. Kennedy really killed by disgruntled Palestinian Sirhan Sirhan as we’ve been led to believe? Or was he another in a long line of Manchurian candidates, a victim of a long standing mind control program.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: End times prophecy experts discuss the possible identity of the antichrist and the timing of his emergence onto the world state.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: Is a powerfully rich cabal with a globalist agenda conspiring to destroy sovereign nations and impose authoritarian rule?

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: Bigfoot
programme.desc: Two prominent Bigfoot trackers and a cryptozoologist affirm the existence of this shy and elusive creature and relate several close encounters with Sasquatch.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: The Execution of MLK and The Framing of James Earl Ray
programme.desc: In this re-examination of the assassination of civil rights leader Martin Luther King, Richard meets several researchers who provide evidence that the convicted gunman, James Earl Ray was not the real triggerman.

programme.title: Greatest Crimes of All Time: Rampage Killers
programme.desc: Rampage Killers. They come out of nowhere – and when they occur, innocent people always die. Investigators must react in a flash and make difficult decisions. Every killing spree is a race against time.

programme.title: Greatest Crimes of All Time: Hitmen
programme.desc: Hitmen are masters of covering their tracks. Their only concern is for loyalty and the greatest possible profit. Investigators must always take care not to become the next victim.

programme.title: Greatest Crimes of All Time: Woman Killers
programme.desc: Ted Bundy – maybe the most famous Woman Killer. But there are more. Ant they all create a perfect social environment in which no one recognizes their true nature.

programme.title: Greatest Crimes of All Time: Female Murderers
programme.desc: Women usually kill in their own peculiar way: sophisticated, tactically, and from behind. They prefer tainted medicines, knives, or poison. And they often kill for years, unnoticed and in secret.

programme.title: Greatest Crimes of All Time: Angels of Death
programme.desc: In hospitals and nursing wards, death is an everyday occurrence. And that is precisely what they count on: angels of death. Some of them rack up more victims in this way than the worst serial killers in the world.

programme.title: Bang Goes The Theory
programme.desc: The science of IVF; following couples who undertake IVF treatment; going 360 degrees on a swing.

programme.title: Bang Goes The Theory
programme.desc: Boat made out of ice; comets; science behind hypothermia.

programme.title: Bang Goes The Theory
programme.desc: Avoiding jetlag; a demonstration of the size of the solar system; square-wheeled motorbike.

programme.title: Bang Goes The Theory
programme.desc: Understanding the devastating Japanese earthquake.

programme.title: Bang Goes The Theory
programme.desc: Jem builds a laser; Yan recreates a demonstration to calculate the speed of light.

programme.title: Bang Goes The Theory
programme.desc: The future of recycling; how GPS works and how it is changing the world; using science to crack a magic trick.

programme.title: Bang Goes The Theory
programme.desc: The origins of weather; seasons allow life to form; Jem checks out wave power in Scotland.

programme.title: Destruction Decoded: CONSTRUCTION
programme.desc: Bridges and tunnels have transformed the way we live, making the inaccessible easy to reach, and turning time consuming journeys into convenient commutes, but when things go wrong they can go very wrong indeed.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Hubble's Renaissance
programme.desc: Before we can reach space, we must first be able to see it. Hundreds of years ago, the simple telescope was used to give us a seemingly closer vantage. Today, we use the awe-inspiring, and super powerful, Hubble Space Telescope.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Superscopes
programme.desc: The human eye can only see visible light, a small spectrum of electromagnetic waves. Today, we have instruments that let us perceive all wavelengths.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Cosmic Rainbow
programme.desc: In the world of astronomy, how do we overcome the limits imposed by our own eyesight? The universe comes alive by viewing the cosmos in infrared light to gamma radiation.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Stargazer's Paradise
programme.desc: The Atacama desert is a perfect place for watching the night sky. With still winds and only a handful of cloudy nights each year, it allows scientists to get the absolute most out of their tools.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Night Fire
programme.desc: The Northern Lights are more than just beautiful; they tell us about the make up of our planet, our sun, and may even be a signpost for the possibility of life on other planets.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Virtual Universe
programme.desc: Our understanding of the cosmos is limited by the amount of time we have to see it. Fortunately, computer simulations can help us see how galaxies interact over millions of years, and even how dark matter structures the universe.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Seasons of Saturn
programme.desc: Saturn is the second largest planet and has an astonishing 60 moons in its orbit. Thanks to the Cassini mission, it's also one of the most studied and most photographed planets in our neighborhood.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Vesta Unveiled
programme.desc: With the Dawn missions exploration of the asteroid Vesta and the dwarf planet Ceres, asteroids are a hot topic. See what these incredible missions have uncovered.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Water Worlds
programme.desc: The key ingredient to life in the universe is water. Until recently we thought Earth was the only place in the solar system to have any water at all. Now that probes are peering around nearby worlds we are finding that is just not the case.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Gravity
programme.desc: Gravity has long been a force that has intrigued scientists. Now, for the first time scientists are probing to detect gravity waves in space as well as mapping the gravity patterns of the moon.

programme.title: The Railways That Built Britain: How the Railways Won the War
programme.desc: The crucial roles the railways played in the two world wars.

programme.title: The Railways That Built Britain: Steam Is Dead, Long Live the Railways
programme.desc: The dying days of steam, and how the railways fought back.

programme.title: Warship: Life at Sea: Episode 1
programme.desc: Heading out to the Med and the Black Sea, the 280 men and women onboard face a heart attack, a man overboard, and a show of force from Russian airplanes.

programme.title: Warship: Life at Sea
programme.desc: The ship and its crew are heading towards Crimea, when a Russian ship HMS Duncan has been tracking suddenly disappears. As they get closer to Crimea, the situation escalates

programme.title: Warship: Life at Sea: Episode 3
programme.desc: Reports that a chemical weapon has been used in Salisbury changes the mood. When another chemical attack takes place in Syria, the ship goes to action stations for the first time.

programme.title: Warship: Life at Sea: Episode 4
programme.desc: The crew stand-off with a Russian warship over Syria, and young sailor Danny tries for his first promotion, but chef Liam gets in trouble for drinking and might lose shore leave.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown: Thailand
programme.desc: Tony teams up with Chef and Author Andy Ricker of Pok Pok Restaurant fame. He's made a name for himself faithfully reproducing the cuisine of Northern Thailand at his restaurants in Portland and NYC.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Tony explores what Burroughs called "Interzone," where artists sought escape from Western moral prohibitions and the possibilities of great empty spaces. But what is it like now?

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Tony visits Andalucia during Semana Santa – Holy Week – a time filled with great pageantry and excitement. Tony’s longtime DP, Zach Zamboni, currently lives in Granada with his fiancée, Fuen Sanchez.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown
programme.desc: After eight years, Tony returns to South Korea. And this time, he’s no stranger to kimchi. But just as Tony has changed, so has Korea.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Sicily isn’t about fast food or the fast life. It’s about savoring family, life, food and making the most of what you have. Tony will go in search of those foods and their producers and eat his way around the island.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Once Johannesburg was the most dangerous city in the world, but the end of the apartheid has lead to vast changes in the city. Tony visits the Johannesburg suburb of Hillbrow, and discovers the culture and, of course food.

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur Rides The Bandwagon/Dad's Dessert Dilemma

programme.title: Arthur: Prunella Sees the Light/Return of the Snowball

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur and D.W. Clean Up/The Long, Dull Winter

programme.title: Arthur: Muffy's Classy Classics Club/Best Enemies

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Turtlemaniac

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Rondo in New York
programme.desc: Word spreads that Oswald Oren, a nerdy Woody Allen-type student, has developed the Vitalizer - an experimental substance that brings inanimate objects to life. Scoundrels Shredder, Krang, Bebop and Rocksteady connive to steal the potion.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Planet of the Turtles
programme.desc: A commercial for the Personal Energy Projector (PEP), allowing the transfer of energy from one source to another, entices Krang. Targeting Earth, he drains the sphere's energy to strengthen the Technodrome.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Name That Toon
programme.desc: Krang threatens to vapourize the city by manipulating a Dematerializer, but a musical instrument that Howie, Irma's friend, plays around with, interferes with the device's programming.

programme.desc: An invitation from April leads the Turtles, Irma and friend Howie to the haunted but renovated Floxy Music Hall, where the legendary Phantom of the Floxy resides.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Superhero for a Day

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Back to the Egg
programme.desc: The foursome are dining out on their favourite food when Michelangelo and Leonardo are suddenly transformed into two five year-olds, thanks to Shredder's latest invention - an age-reversing serum.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Son of Return of the Fly II
programme.desc: After escaping from dimensional limbo, the Fly (alias Baxter Stockman) and his computer companion Z employ an experimental solid-energy generator to take over Channel Six.

programme.desc: House of Ha comedians are disappearing, right in the middle of their acts.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies walk across Teletubbyland to watch some children paint some pictures in a very interesting and messy way. It’s time for Tubby Custard, but Po makes too much Tubby Custard and the custard goes all over Home Hill. Noo Noo tidies up.

programme.title: Teletubbies

programme.desc: Po makes some adjustments on the switch panel and then joins the others to watch Andy Brown and two children looking in a pond for frogs. Laa-Laa is looking at the flowers, but Dipsy keeps getting in the way.

programme.title: Teletubbies

programme.title: Teletubbies

programme.title: Teletubbies

programme.title: Teletubbies

programme.title: Mona the Vampire

programme.desc: Mona's secret scrapbook (or, as she calls it, \The Book of the Slimy\") has gone missing." // The regular cafeteria staff is on vacation and a husband and wife team by the name of Sam and Ella have taken over kitchen duties.

programme.title: Mona the Vampire
programme.desc: Mona's town is seized by paroxysms of sporadic exercise when a fitness instructor from Australia, Bruce, opens up a new fitness center. // When Miss Gotto falls ill and is replaced by a substitute, Mona immediately suspects foul play.

programme.title: Mona the Vampire
programme.desc: Eerie night time rattling. Disembodied groans. // There's a werewolf loose in the school, a furry, slobbering beast running amok in the hallowed halls of academia.

programme.title: Mona the Vampire
programme.desc: An evening's dining at a local Chinese restaurant takes a terrifying turn // Angela has started a chapter of the Pixies, an all girl service organization devoted to being helpful

programme.title: Mona the Vampire
programme.desc: When Miss Gotto's bossy older sister substitutes for her, Mona uncovers a horrible plot// After the kids encounter a maniacal wizard at the new Laser Dome, everything they imagine starts to come true.

programme.title: Snitch (2013)
programme.desc: A father (Dwayne Johnson) goes undercover for the DEA in order to free his son who was imprisoned after being set up in a drug deal.

programme.title: Rebel in the Rye
programme.desc: The life of celebrated but reclusive author, J.D. Salinger, who gained worldwide fame with the publication of his novel, "The Catcher in the Rye".

programme.title: Match Point
programme.desc: At a turning point in his life, a former tennis pro falls for an actress who happens to be dating his friend and soon-to-be brother-in-law.

programme.title: World Poker Tour: St. Kitt's Day 1 & Day 2, Final Table $1 million prize
programme.desc: The world's top professionals and wealthiest amateurs compete for $100,000 each at Royal Beach Casino and Christophe Harbour in St. Kitts.

programme.title: World Poker Tour: WPT Five Diamond World Poker Classic 2022 - Part 1
programme.desc: WPT Champion Moshin Charnia has his sights set on winning the WPT Five Diamond World Poker Classic.

programme.title: World Poker Tour: WPT Five Diamond World Poker Classic 2022 - Part 2
programme.desc: Five remain in the fight for the title of WPT Five Diamond World Poker Classic Champion.

programme.title: World Poker Tour: WPT Five Diamond World Poker Classic 2022 - Part 3
programme.desc: The historic WPT Five Diamond World Poker Classic nears an end as only four remain in the battle.

programme.title: La Grande Bouffe
programme.desc: A group of men go to a villa in the French countryside where they resolve to eat themselves to death.

programme.title: The Little Princess
programme.desc: Shirley Temple plays Sara Crewe, the privileged daughter of Captain Reginald Crewe. When the Captain leaves to fight in Africa, Sara is enrolled into an all-girls school in London. All is well until he is reported dead, but Sara thinks he's still alive.

programme.title: The Lady Vanishes
programme.desc: Alfred Hitchcock mixes suspense, comedy, witty dialog, and endearing character in this charming, classic mystery. When a kindly governess vanishes from a train, no one believes she even exists…except for one woman who sets about solving the mystery.

programme.title: Jack Hunter: And The Quest For Akhenatens Tomb
programme.desc: Jack Hunter is abducted blindfolded to a Turkish US base to be recruited by the NSA, told his mentor was killed because Albert Littmann's Russian mob employer Doridanov want the ancient Osiris-weapon.

programme.title: Spy Next Door
programme.desc: A former CIA agent hoping to settle down with his girlfriend uses an opportunity to babysit her children as a chance to win them over. However, things take a dramatic turn when an old enemy shows up, forcing him back into his old lifestyle.

programme.title: Resistance
programme.desc: Based on the acclaimed novel. 1944: The D-Day landings have failed, and the German Wehrmacht has invaded Britain. The country is now under enemy occupation. In a remote valley in the Black Mountains of Wales, the women awake to discover the men are gone.

programme.title: The Rival
programme.desc: Starring Tracy Nelson, Heather Tom, and Linden Ashby. Alice is unable to have children with her husband George. Enlisting the aid of a surrogate is meant to solve their problem, but instead drives Alice to paranoia - and murder.

programme.title: Mary Higgins Clark
programme.desc: Freddie has everything--a gorgeous new husband and half ownership of a winery. But when her business partner's wife is murdered, Freddi suspects her partner's new love.

programme.title: Killer Infatuation
programme.desc: Mackenzie runs a killer-dedicated podcast with a large fan base. However, she begins living her own murder mystery, as she develops an infatuation with her impossibly attractive new neighbor, who was the prime suspect in a murder years ago.

programme.title: Earth to Echo
programme.desc: After receiving a bizarre series of encrypted messages, a group of kids embark on an adventure with an alien who needs their help.

programme.title: Wizards Of The Lost Kingdom
programme.desc: When evil screams throughout the world. When all the galaxies converge. When all that's fair and fine seems lost. A Hero will emerge.

programme.title: Jumper
programme.desc: A man discovers that he possesses the ability to instantly teleport anywhere in the world.

programme.title: Drug Wars: The Rio Grande Smokescreen
programme.desc: Border Patrol in the Rio Grande Valley is on the hunt for illegal narcotics smuggled over from Mexico

programme.title: Timber Kings: Take to the Trees
programme.desc: Peter may have met his match when he builds a mountainside ski cabin for a client experienced in log-home building.

programme.title: Timber Kings: Living the Dream
programme.desc: Beat builds a lottery winner’s 7,000-sq.ft. dream home in northern Alberta. Meanwhile, Peter must beg, borrow and steal to deliver on two high profile entryways for Canada’s Winter Games.

programme.title: Timber Kings: Night Sweats
programme.desc: Beat battles a stuck truck in the middle of the night, then builds in darkness to meet his deadline on a home in northern Ontario.

programme.title: Timber Kings: Log Building for Dummies
programme.desc: Joel pinch hits in Oregon, by building a home he’s never seen before using a crane he hopes he’ll never see again.

programme.title: Timber Kings: Weather or Not
programme.desc: Peter battles the elements to build a retirement home for childhood sweethearts, while Bryan Jr. constructs an entryway for his own sweetheart - wife Tabby.

programme.title: Elvira's Movie Macabre The Werewolf of Washington
programme.desc: While on assignment in Hungary, a young reporter is attacked by a mysterious animal. (1981)

programme.title: H.G. Wells' The Invisible Man: Blind Justice
programme.desc: When an airline pilot is framed for drug smuggling, a killer comes to his home to silence him... and the pilot's blind wife (Honor Blackman) is the only witness.

programme.title: H.G. Wells' The Invisible Man: Strange Partners
programme.desc: A wealthy man uses extortion and a trained attack dog to force Peter to kill his partner and make it look like a heart attack.

programme.title: H.G. Wells' The Invisible Man: Odds Against Death
programme.desc: A gangster forces one of Peter's staff to developed a mathematical system to win at the roulette table.

programme.title: H.G. Wells' The Invisible Man: Picnic With Death
programme.desc: Peter's existence as an invisible man becomes public knowledge, while Sally's friend needs help when her stepfather plots to kill her invalid mother.

programme.title: H.G. Wells' The Invisible Man: Play to Kill
programme.desc: A celebrated actress runs down a hobo by accident and a witness blackmails her, threatening to expose her secret.

programme.title: H.G. Wells' The Invisible Man: The Rocket
programme.desc: A top-secret rocket is compromised when one of the scientists runs into gambling debts. Peter heads out on a desperate search for the missing rocket.

programme.title: H.G. Wells' The Invisible Man: Point of Destruction
programme.desc: Four tragic air accidents seem to point to the failure of a fuel diffuser being tested, but Peter suspects sabotage is at play.

programme.title: H.G. Wells' The Invisible Man: Death Cell
programme.desc: An escaped mental patient comes to Peter, asking for his help in getting her fiancͩ cleared of a murder charge as he awaits execution.

programme.title: 2014 FIFA World Cup
programme.desc: After surviving a tense semifinal decided by penalty kicks, Argentina must face Germany, fresh off its rout of Brazil, to determine which team will lift the World Cup trophy. From Maracana Stadium in Rio de Janeiro, Brazil.

programme.title: Moments - The Official Film of the 2023 FIFA Women's World Cup
programme.desc: A review of key moments in the biggest women's sporting event in the world, both on and off the pitch. Thirty-two teams descend on Australia and New Zealand in a bid to become champions of the world.

programme.title: Eyes of the World
programme.desc: Check out the time when Ghana and Uruguay met in the quarterfinal of the 2010 FIFA World Cup in South Africa; take a look at how no one could have predicted what would happen next.

programme.title: 2022 FIFA World Cup
programme.desc: Football entertainment for fans! Watch documentaries, original series and select live matches as well as historic moments from the FIFA World Cup™️, FIFA Club World Cup™️, FIFA Women's World Cup™️ and more.

programme.title: Looper
programme.desc: A mob hit man (Joseph Gordon-Levitt) comes to the chilling realization that his latest assignment is his older self (Bruce Willis), sent back in time by his bosses.

programme.title: Rookie Blue

programme.title: The FBI Files: Moving Target
programme.desc: When a sniper in Utah started targeting African-American men for death, authorities launched a massive investigation. With scant clues and no witnesses they found the odds stacked against them, and they had no idea where the killer would strike next.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Deadly Secrets

programme.title: The FBI Files

programme.title: Dark Waters of Crime: The Bathtub Sisters
programme.desc: The mother of two teenaged girls is found dead in her bathtub. The coroner declares it an accidental death, but a year later, new information prompt the police to reopen the case.

programme.title: Dark Waters of Crime: Mother's Intuition
programme.desc: 14-year-old Pamela Bischoff misses her curfew on April 12, 1991. Though she has only been missing a few hours, her mother, Gail, tells the Oromocto RCMP she is certain Pamela has been raped and murdered by an older boy named Billy Stillman.

programme.title: Dark Waters of Crime: Winston's Secret
programme.desc: In April 1996, Winston Malcolm is rescued from icy waters of a lake after a canoe accident. He announced to hospital staff that his wife was with him. A dive team is called to the rescue, and the body of Jan Marshall is finally found a few days later.

programme.title: Dark Waters of Crime: Friend or Foe
programme.desc: Jutta Weber is last seen on August 6, 1997. In August 1999, Don Gazley is arrested and wants to cut a deal: if the police make his charges go away, he’ll tell them where Jutta Weber’s body is. Is Gazley telling the truth?

programme.title: Dark Waters of Crime: Bad Trip

programme.title: Dark Waters of Crime: House of Horrors
programme.desc: The body of a woman is found floating next to a dock. The case takes the detectives into a sinister world from which few come out unharmed.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Crimes Of Passion
programme.desc: When killers are driven by jealousy and desire, their desperation is evident in both the crime and their efforts to avoid detection. But forensic science can reveal even the slightest mistake to solve crimes of passion.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Price of Murder
programme.desc: Using science as their most powerful weapon, investigators must find these hired killers and make them pay the true price of murder.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Broken Trust
programme.desc: A New York homebuyer gets more than he bargained for when a house inspection turns up a mummified corpse. For decades, the crime had gone undiscovered. The victim unmissed, and the killer unpunished.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Missing
programme.desc: Approximately 1.8 million Americans are reported missing each year. Some are runaways who find their way home, but others simply disappear. When foul play is suspected, investigators turn to forensics to find the missing.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Fatal Error
programme.desc: Accidental deaths, suicides, disappearances, and fires; they're an everyday part of an insurance investigator's life. But cases shouldn't be taken at face value. Forensics has become a tool for exposing insurance fraud.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Six Feet Under
programme.desc: Kenda finds the body of a bruised and battered young woman named Vicki Ross strangled. Kenda must sort through the endless suspicious characters in Vicki's past to find the elusive truth.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Shallow Grave
programme.desc: Lt. Joe Kenda and his team investigate the scene of an apparent suicide, only to be forced to flee when they discover the house is booby-trapped.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Murder Bites

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Blood From A Stone
programme.desc: A bystander receives a deadly head injury during a roadside altercation, but the stakes are raised when his body disappears from the scene. When a toddler is kidnapped for ransom Kenda joins forces with an undercover team in a desperate race against time.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Eyes of a Child
programme.desc: A loving, churchgoing grandmother is found stabbed to death in her apartment, leaving Joe Kenda to wonder what sort of monster could do such a thing.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Bullet With My Name On It
programme.desc: In his first year on the force, rookie patrol officer Joe Kenda quickly learns the ropes. But when he tries to singlehandedly stop a brawling mob, he finds himself facing down gunfire.

programme.desc: Garfield and Nermal are the finalists in a big cat show./Roy invents a holiday./Garfield tries to lecture an audience about himself.

programme.desc: Garfield dons the disguise of "the Caped Avenger."/Wade's fear of flying comes full throttle./Jon decides to grow his own food.

programme.desc: Garfield loses his memory and becomes "nice."/Bo moves out of the house just as big storm hits./The worlds' greatest salesman shows up.

programme.desc: Garfield finds competition from a mangy stray./Roy's jokes become so intolerable, that Orson fires the rooster./Garfield buys a winning lottery ticket and becomes a millionaire.

programme.desc: Jon mistakenly buys a man-eating fern./Orson tries to get a record player for Bo./Jon becomes a health and exercise nut.

programme.title: On the Case: Field of Nightmares

programme.title: On the Case: Murder Ordained?

programme.title: On the Case: A Ray of Darkness
programme.desc: Police must connect two vicious murders in order to bring a single killer to justice.

programme.title: On the Case: Pattern of Violence
programme.desc: A 22 year old real estate agent is discovered strangled to death inside a model home she was trying to sell.

programme.title: On the Case: Cry on My Shoulder
programme.desc: When a young woman disappears, police zero in on her violent ex-boyfriend. But the secret to solving the case is buried in a cold case file.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Shipman
programme.desc: Doctor Harold Shipman was convicted of killing 15 patients in 2000, but he is thought to have killed up to 215. Discover how he was eventually caught by detectives.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Stephanie Slater
programme.desc: Estate agent Stephanie Slater reveals the story of her abduction, rape and incarceration, which occurred in 1992 whilst showing a man around a house.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: The Russell Murders
programme.desc: Bludgeoned to death whilst walking down a country lane, the horrific murders of Lin and Megan Russell made worldwide news. Discover the events of that shocking day.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Beverly Allitt
programme.desc: Beverley Allitt was thought to be a 'model' nurse. Very astute, caring and always willing to help, why did she murder four children and attempt to kill 11 others?

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: The London Nail Bombings
programme.desc: London was brought to a standstill in April 1999 when 23-year-old political extremist David Copeland caused terror with a bombing campaign.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Death of a Dream
programme.desc: In 2002, dancer Catherine Woods went to New York in search of fame but became a stripper to pay the rent. She started seeing Paul Cortez while living with her ex-boyfriend David Haughn. In November 2005, she was murdered. The two men became suspects.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Murder in the Fast Lane
programme.desc: A report on the March 1988 murder of legendary racecar driver Mickey Thompson and his wife Trudy. Thompson’s sister is convinced that Michael Goodwin, her brother’s former partner, was the killer.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Fight For The Truth
programme.desc: 17-year-old Marty Tankleff was convicted of murdering his adoptive parents in their home. Marty initially confessed, but quickly recanted. He has fought for years for his innocence, as new witnesses have surfaced who could potentially exonerate him.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Buried Secrets of Las Vegas
programme.desc: A report on the death of gaming tycoon Ted Binion, who was found dead in his Las Vegas home. Paranoid about his wealth, he stashed millions of dollars’ worth of silver in a hidden vault in Pahrump, Nevada.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Sugar Land Conspiracy
programme.desc: In December 2003, the Whitaker family-- Kent, his wife Tricia, and their sons, Bart and Kevin-- returned home from dinner. Upon entering the house, Kevin and Tricia were fatally shot. The investigation revealed that the murders had been planned by Bart.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Deadly Prophecy
programme.desc: Faylene Eaves, divorced Arizona mother of two, married Doug Grant, a divorced single dad, in 1993. They were both Mormons. Faylene had revelations from God that could have contributed to her death, however her husband was found guilty of murdering her.

programme.title: My Misdiagnosis
programme.desc: Samantha has abdominal pains that make it difficult to function. Laura injures her shoulder in a workplace accident and is told that she is too young for the surgery needed to make her better.

programme.title: My Misdiagnosis
programme.desc: Krystal's aches and pains are misdiagnosed due to her young age. Rebecca's diagnosis of anxiety and depression sends her down a life-threatening path.

programme.title: My Misdiagnosis
programme.desc: Cathy is first diagnosed with the flu, then with Chronic Fatigue Syndrome. Tamara's bloating and stomach pain do not get better and what she is eventually diagnosed with turns out to be a nightmare.

programme.title: Something's Killing Me
programme.desc: Neurologist Dr Autumn Klein collapsed and was rushed to hospital, but after three days in ICU she passed away. Doctors investigate the mysterious cause of death.

programme.title: Something's Killing Me
programme.desc: Charles Cullen was a critical care nurse who worked in hospitals in New Jersey and Pennsylvania. When several patients die mysteriously during his shifts, authorities begin to investigate.

programme.title: Something's Killing Me
programme.desc: Hope and her family and friends were preparing for her funeral when they discover a shocking secret.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: London Calling
programme.desc: Oscar is forced to choose between his romantic plans with Charlotte (Teri Hatcher) and helping to save Felix's relationship as Emily decides to extend her stay in London.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: I Kid, You Not

programme.title: The Odd Couple: Taffy Days
programme.desc: Oscar reconnects with many significant people from his father's life when he agrees to carry out Walter's last request to spread his ashes behind the candy factory he once owned.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: Miss England
programme.desc: Dani's excitement at being promoted is cut short when Oscar tasks her with the daunting job of hiring her own replacement.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: Eisen Trouble
programme.desc: Oscar tries to outsmart his nemesis, Rich Eisen, after he is forced to present him with a humanitarian award.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: The Odd Couples
programme.desc: Oscar and Felix seek the advice of a counselor in their apartment building to help overcome their issues.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: Felix Navidad

programme.title: The Odd Couple: My Best Friend's Girl

programme.title: The Odd Couple: Should She Stay or Should She Go?
programme.desc: Felix meets a fun-loving woman, Natasha (Busy Phillips), in a bar and takes her home for what is meant to be a one-night stand.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: Batman vs. The Penguin
programme.desc: Murph gets Oscar to agree to participate in a regular TV segment where he competes with a penguin at the zoo to predict the winners of hockey games.

programme.title: Murder by the Sea
programme.desc: Steven Grierson is a serial killer who murdered four teenagers and terrorised dozens of others, becoming known as the Sunderland strangler.

programme.title: Murder by the Sea
programme.desc: Paul Teed murdered three of his family members in a nightclub over a dispute over money. He then fled back to his home in Bradford, believing he had the perfect alibi.

programme.title: Murder by the Sea
programme.desc: Sidney Fox swindled unmarried women and cashed stolen cheques while travelling the country. This eventually led to murder with the intention of claiming the victim's life insurance.

programme.title: Murder by the Sea
programme.desc: On Valentine's Day Paul Dyson strangled his partner Joanne Nelson to death before removing her body and making it look like she had just disappeared.

programme.title: Murder by the Sea
programme.desc: After Andre Genestin's wife discovered he had been cheating on her, he murdered her and stored her body in a car roof box in the garden.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: In 1976, a young woman is found dead at a military base in Orange County, California. Using forensic genealogy, experts break open the 40-year-old cold case.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: In 1988, Janet Tinsley reports her 8-year-old daughter April missing after she fails to return home. Three days later, a man out jogging makes a gruesome discovery in a nearby ditch.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: In 1987, a man finds his wife brutally murdered on the kitchen floor.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives

programme.desc: Comedian Nick Helm samples some lovely jubbly scran in Peckham. On the menu at two imaginatively named eateries - a bao bun at Mr Bao and tapas at Miss Tapas.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil

programme.desc: Sharon Whelan and her two daughters were murdered in their home on Christmas Eve by a cold and calculating killer. Multidiscipline forensics uncovered his horrific actions and brought him to justice.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Looking Back and Talking Quack
programme.desc: The Robertson family takes a look back at 130 episodes of Duck Dynasty.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: All the Colors of the Heart
programme.desc: An athlete who expects to gain his sight must counsel another man who is certain to lose his.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: Why Punish the Children?
programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark take on a system that keeps inmate mothers and their children apart.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: A Dream of Wild Horses
programme.desc: The patriarch of a ranch family feels he's too old to rein in some wild horses.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: In With the "In" Crowd
programme.desc: A cop is working undercover at a school to put an end to drug use, but faces suspension because of a mistake Mark has made.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: With Love, The Claus
programme.desc: At Christmastime, Jonathan and Mark try to get a divorced couple to work together for their son's sake. Meanwhile, the holiday may be in jeopardy when a department store Santa is arrested.

programme.title: What On Earth
programme.desc: Embark on an eye-opening journey as experts investigate the startling mysteries captured by satellites orbiting the Earth: from hidden worlds to unexplainable natural phenomena.

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed
programme.desc: Is biological life merely a stepping stone for a universe dominated by alien artificial intelligence?

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed
programme.desc: This episode looks at whether fighter jets provide an adequate defense security against UFOs.

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed: Episode 4
programme.desc: Previously sealed documents hint at compelling new theories about extraterrestrials. Could aliens be living among us? And could former US Presidents know something we don't?

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed
programme.desc: UFO Metal: Nations all over the world are rumoured to have found metal debris from UFO crashes. Join the investigation into the alleged wreckages of otherworldly crafts.

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed: Alien Encyclopedia
programme.desc: Series investigating compelling UFO and alien cases by opening previously off-limits secret files. Does the mysterious Blue Planet Project hold the answers?

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed
programme.desc: Top Civilian Encounters: From mass sightings in the sky to reports of alien probes found in human bodies, explore the ten most disturbing extraterrestrial encounters ever.

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed
programme.desc: Discover how international governments investigate UFO sightings and the secrecy in which they shroud their findings.

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed: Aliens and the Vatican
programme.desc: Recently-declassified FBI files cast new light on the existence of aliens, as well as question whether the Vatican could be hiding proof of extra-terrestrial life.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Trial, Pt. 1
programme.desc: Jackie discovers her father is listed as "unknown" on her birth certificate. Alexis buys the company planning to publish Caress' book. Fighting for his empire, Blake must endure the devastating lies of the one woman bent on his destruction-- Alexis.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Trial, Pt. 2
programme.desc: Blake's hopes for victory are crushed by a drunken witness; Bart is dropped as a senatorial candidate; the woman who can clear Blake's name is forced to conceal her identity.

programme.title: Dynasty: Vote
programme.desc: Blake loses the trial and now fears losing Denver-Carrington; Ben and Alexis pit themselves against Blake and Caress; Garrett learns that he is Jackie's father; a reporter's lies intensify the battle between Alexis and Blake.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Warning
programme.desc: Caress discovers Emily and Ben's secret and Blake is double-crossed by an old friend. Alexis schemes to turn the Chinese government against Blake; Claudia threatens to reveal Adam's power of attorney over Denver-Carrington.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Cry
programme.desc: Blake is tricked into borrowing money from Alexis; Jackie returns home to some shocking news; Blake learns the identity of the woman who can save his reputation; ignored by family and taunted by a reporter, Amanda attempts suicide.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Rescue
programme.desc: The guilt-ridden Alexis fears she is too late when she finds Amanda unconscious; Dominique proposes to Garrett; Steven believes he may lose Danny to Sammy Jo and Clay; Ben makes special plans for Caress and Alexis.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Colleen met Tony online and fell in love. Despite never meeting, Tony proposed over the phone and Colleen accepted! Nev and Max help her face reality to reveal the man she's engaged to! (S6, ep11)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Nev and Max embark on their biggest case as they track down the infamous Shelly Chartier to uncover truths about the celeb catfishing of Paris Roxanne and NBA star Chris Andersen. (S6, ep12)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: After Jonathon's online love disappears, he enlists Nev and Max to help track him down. But when the guys discover a former catfish is involved, they begin to suspect Jonathon himself. (S6, ep13)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance

programme.title: America's Next Top Model

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: The truckers in the historic four-truck convoy face fire and a thin crossing; after Art Burke's engine dies, he must travel back to Winnipeg with Alex Debogorski over a trail that destroys his truck.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: The drivers are ready for what is forecast to be a cold and busy winter, but the tragic passing of legendary driver Darrell Ward leaves the drivers wondering who can take his place.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: Lisa Kelly finds herself in a real jam after jackknifing her truck deep in the back-country; Alex Debogorski gets more than he bargained for when he falls through a patch of thin ice; Todd Dewey comes to the aid of a stranded trucker.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: A sudden warm-up threatens to derail the ice road season; Art Burke faces scary and slick roads; Lisa Kelly is forced to ask her former boss for financial help; Alex Debogorski encounters a mystery man walking alone on an isolated winter road.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: A blast of arctic air reopens the ice roads; Steph Custance falls victim to severe icing and winds up in a ditch; truckers set out to see if the newly reopened ice crossings are really ready for their big rigs.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: Polar Industries must deliver an oversized load hundreds of miles north on the winter roads; owner Mark Koyhaykewych recruits Lisa Kelly, then calls in Reno Ward, the 23-year-old son of the late Darrell Ward; a blizzard adds a new layer of danger.

programme.title: Customer Wars
programme.desc: A customer causes chaos with a fire extinguisher; a man renting out his luxury car for the day finds it at a body shop; a bar patron keeps his cool in the face of an armed robber; a supermarket customer starts arguing with the staff.

programme.title: Customer Wars
programme.desc: A plate shatters on a woman's face during a brawl over restaurant seating; a man wreaks havoc in a video game store over their return policy; a delivery driver falls into a 13-foot septic hole while attempting to deliver a package.

programme.title: Customer Wars
programme.desc: A stubborn moviegoer refuses to give up his seat, causing employees to stop the movie and intervene; a woman throws a tantrum after being ordered off a flight for not complying with the airline's pet policy.

programme.title: Customer Wars
programme.desc: At a fast food restaurant in South Carolina, a man stands up to a customer and things become physical; when two rowdy spring breakers cause some trouble at a beach in Florida, a lone officer arrives and takes immediate control of the situation.

programme.title: Customer Wars
programme.desc: In Florida, a couple is booted from a flight after allegedly refusing to follow instructions; a young girl in California finds herself stuck in a gumball machine; a hatchet-wielding customer terrifies customers in a New York City restaurant.

programme.title: Customer Wars

programme.title: Customer Wars
programme.desc: A customer fights a raging fire in a New Jersey superstore; a mother in Massachusetts calls 911 on her son's barber; late-night brawlers in Maryland end up crashing through a store's window.

programme.title: Customer Wars
programme.desc: At a fast food restaurant in Florida, a customer acts out after claiming to witness unclean behavior from an employee; a jewelry shop owner wrestles with a robber wielding a large knife; an angry customer pulls out a gun at a Utah drive-thru.

programme.title: Customer Wars

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: The Execution of MLK and The Framing of James Earl Ray
programme.desc: In this re-examination of the assassination of civil rights leader Martin Luther King, Richard meets several researchers who provide evidence that the convicted gunman, James Earl Ray was not the real triggerman.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: The legend of the werewolf throughout history and in various cultures is explored. The Conspiracy Show travels to England and rural Wisconsin to investigate claims of actual werewolf sightings.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: Richard meets the owners of an abnormal humanoid skull allegedly discovered in Mexico in the 1930s and a researcher who has had the skull subjected to numerous tests including carbon-14 dating, and DNA in order to determine it’s origin.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: Richard speaks with the pre-eminent investigators of the alleged crash of a UFO near Roswell, New Mexico in 1947.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: The Assassination of John Lennon
programme.desc: The Conspiracy Show travels to New York, LA and Toronto in order to investigate the murder of John Lennon. Several researchers posit that Lennon's supposed killer Mark David Chapman was either a patsy or a mind-controlled assassin.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: The Fake Arab Spring?
programme.desc: Who was really behind a series of revolts, protests, and uprisings that swept the Middle East starting in late 2010?

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: Richard witnesses a municipal employee in Toronto, Canada undergo a regression during which he re-experiences a previous life as a doctor in early 20 century England.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: The Philadelphia Experiment
programme.desc: Richard investigates a legendary naval military experiment said to have been carried out at the Philadelphia Naval Shipyard in October 1943.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: Alien Abductions
programme.desc: Richard speaks with two alleged alien abductees about their claims they were taken aboard an alien space craft.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: Pterodactyls
programme.desc: Richard speaks with several explorers and cryptozoologists who believe pterodactyls, flying dinosaurs thought to have become extinct some 60 million years ago, are alive and thriving in remote places such as Papua New Guinea.

programme.title: Greatest Crimes of All Time: Angels of Death
programme.desc: In hospitals and nursing wards, death is an everyday occurrence. And that is precisely what they count on: angels of death. Some of them rack up more victims in this way than the worst serial killers in the world.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: On June 28, 2005, Joan Porco attends the trial of her son Christopher, accused of murdering his father and attacking her. Despite her initial identification and later refusal to testify, Christopher is found guilty based on circumstantial evidence.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside The ROM, Toronto
programme.desc: From a medieval hand-grenade to an extremely rare dinosaur, discover the secrets inside the Royal Ontario Museum.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Vatican
programme.desc: From Michelangelo’s Sistine Chapel frescoes to the fall of the Knights Templar, discover the secrets inside the Vatican Museums.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Pergamon and Neues Museums, Berlin
programme.desc: From Vikings who break unbreakable swords to curators who solve the world’s hardest jigsaw puzzle, discover the secrets inside the Pergamon and Neues Museums.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Egyptian Museum
programme.desc: From the mystery of a Pharaoh’s gold to the strange practice of animal mummification, discover the secrets inside the Egyptian Museum.

programme.title: Destruction Decoded: CONSTRUCTION
programme.desc: Bridges and tunnels have transformed the way we live, making the inaccessible easy to reach, and turning time consuming journeys into convenient commutes, but when things go wrong they can go very wrong indeed.

programme.title: Destruction Decoded: AIR, LAND AND SEA
programme.desc: Planes, trains and ships, our mass transit systems, have had a profound effect on mankind, making the world smaller and more connected.

programme.title: Destruction Decoded: HURRICANES
programme.desc: Hurricanes, Typhoons and Cyclones all the same thing with different names – what they also have in common is their destructive power! Hurricanes are large, swirling storms and winds from a hurricane can damage buildings or trees.

programme.title: Destruction Decoded: TORNADO
programme.desc: A tornado is a violently rotating column of air extending from the base of a thunderstorm down to the ground. Tornadoes are capable of completely destroying well-made structures, uprooting trees, and hurling objects through the air like deadly missiles.

programme.title: Destruction Decoded: VOLCANOES
programme.desc: Volcanoes are Earth’s geologic architects. They’ve created more than 80 percent of our planet’s surface and their explosive force has crafted both mountains and craters.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Gravity
programme.desc: Gravity has long been a force that has intrigued scientists. Now, for the first time scientists are probing to detect gravity waves in space as well as mapping the gravity patterns of the moon.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Science and the Shuttle
programme.desc: For more than 25 years the shuttle was our ticket to space, and our laboratory in orbit. Uncover the legacy of this amazing machine, and see what lies ahead.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Landing on Mars
programme.desc: Mars sparks our curiosity like no other planet because it is so reachable. Despite having landed there, most of the information we gather is still done by instruments in the planet's orbit.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Milky Way
programme.desc: This episode traces our view of the Milky Way, from the mythology of ancient sky watchers to the efforts of scientists to map it from the inside out.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: The Big Bang
programme.desc: Throughout history, our nightly view of the universe has fueled our collective imagination. When it comes to the Big Bang, not even the most creative work of imagination can rival what science has revealed about the birth of the universe.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: The Hot Zone
programme.desc: Mercury is one Earth's closest neighbors, but for centuries it eluded astronomer's best efforts to learn its secrets. But that has changed thanks to missions like Mariner and most recently, Messenger.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Cosmic Rays
programme.desc: Cosmic rays can tell us much about the universe. They are not simply another form of light, but carriers of information about powerful and unseen processes at work thousands or even millions of light years away.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Fermi Paradox
programme.desc: The Fermi Paradox asks the ultimate question: Given a few reasonable assumptions about the chance of life arising elsewhere in the universe and the distance between the stars, why has an alien civilization not presented itself?

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Landsat
programme.desc: Take a look at Landsat 8, the advanced planetary explorer with a 900 million dollar price tag! It is designed to peer across multiple wavelengths to reveal complex and ever-changing details that are undetectable by the human eye.

programme.title: Earthrise: The First Lunar Voyage
programme.desc: Interviews with Apollo 8 astronauts, their wives, mission control staff, and journalists give true insider's perspective to the space race of the late 1960's.

programme.title: Warship: Life at Sea: Episode 4
programme.desc: The crew stand-off with a Russian warship over Syria, and young sailor Danny tries for his first promotion, but chef Liam gets in trouble for drinking and might lose shore leave.

programme.title: Witches: A Century of Murder: Episode 1
programme.desc: Suzannah reveals what it must have been like to be accused of witchcraft.

programme.title: Witches: A Century of Murder: Episode 2

programme.title: Arthur: Big Brother Binky, Parts I&II
programme.desc: Binky's family has decided to adopt a little girl from China. The thought of a baby sister makes Binky happy, until he realized there are some changes in store. It’s a lot harder than he thought, but it has its rewards too.

programme.title: Arthur: For the Birds/Ungifted
programme.desc: Brain dreams of being the first to spot a rare bird species called the green-tailed grebe, making him famous. Arthur and Buster's friendship is put to the test when Arthur gives away a present that Buster had given him for his birthday.

programme.title: Arthur: So Long, Spanky/Buster's New Friend
programme.desc: D.W.'s beloved bird gets very sick, and despite D.W.'s eager ministrations, Spanky dies. Can she risk giving her heart to another pet? Then, Buster doesn't have time for Arthur. And all he wants to talk about is a new friend named Mike.

programme.title: Arthur: Postcards from Buster, Parts I & II
programme.desc: Buster's going to New York City to meet his dad Bo, and the Reads are coming with him! He's thrilled ... but won't his mom miss him? But, Bitzi gives him a present that will let him share his exciting trip with her--a video camera!

programme.title: Arthur: To Tibble the Truth/Waiting to Go
programme.desc: When the Tibble Twins' constant lying lands them in constant trouble, they promise to tell only the truth. Binky and Brain collide on the soccer field, breaking Brain's new watch and nearly breaking their friendship.

programme.title: Arthur: D.W., Queen of the Comeback/In My Africa
programme.desc: The Tibbles tease, D.W. fires back, the Tibbles taunt, D.W. has a snappy comeback, and round and round they go! Will it ever end? Then, D.W.'s new classmate, Cheikh, is Brain's young cousin…and is also from Senegal, Africa!

programme.title: Arthur: D.W. Beats All/Buster the Myth Maker
programme.desc: After the Tibbles get a set of drums to play at the music festival, D.W. is determined to get an even bigger and louder one. Then, Buster is always telling the most incredible stories, but now he claims there is a tiger in the state forest.

programme.title: Arthur: Rhyme For Your Life/For Whom The Bell Tolls
programme.desc: While struggling to write a poem for his mom, Binky falls asleep and gets trapped in Verseberg--where it's a crime not to rhyme! And D.W. has lost her voice! For Arthur it's a dream come true--until Mom asks Arthur to take care of D.W.

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur Goes Crosswire/Sue Ellen And The Brainasaurous
programme.desc: Since they rescued Wilbur Rabbit, Arthur and Muffy have been inseparable. But the rest of their friends are growing tired of the new Arthur. And, Brain's a great partner for a school assignment--unless you wanted to work on it, too!

programme.title: WWII In Color: From D-Day to Nazi Downfall
programme.desc: After a brutal day of relentless combat, the Allies secure a 50-mile bridgehead in Normandy.

programme.title: WWII In Color: From D-Day to Nazi Downfall
programme.desc: Germany's retreat continues as the Allies liberate France and Belgium. Montgomery's ambition to end the war risks more than his reputation as the push toward the Netherlands begins.

programme.title: WWII In Color: From D-Day to Nazi Downfall
programme.desc: Eisenhower approves a plan to break German lines by Christmas. With just seven days to prepare, Monty ignores warnings, rushes the largest airborne assault ever, and pushes ahead despite rising risks.

programme.title: WWII In Color: From D-Day to Nazi Downfall
programme.desc: Airborne troops flood the Netherlands as 50,000 tanks surge from Belgium. However, stronger-than-expected German forces resist fiercely, causing the ambitious operation to falter.

programme.title: WWII In Color: From D-Day to Nazi Downfall
programme.desc: Market Garden stalls with tragedy at Arnhem, stalemate at Nijmegen, and chaos elsewhere. Outnumbered 4 to 1 in places, even Montgomery's gamble can't overcome the mounting odds.

programme.title: WWII In Color: From D-Day to Nazi Downfall
programme.desc: Eisenhower halts Monty's costly gamble as British forces retreat before destruction. Heavy casualties and strategic failures haunt the Allies, with lasting effects for the war's remainder.

programme.title: WWII In Color: From D-Day to Nazi Downfall
programme.desc: After six months of retreat across Northern Europe, Adolf Hitler's forces on the Western Front are back behind Germany's borders.

programme.title: WWII In Color: From D-Day to Nazi Downfall
programme.desc: American forces reel from the impact of massive surprise attack along an 80-mile front in The Ardennes Forest.

programme.title: History Of Weapons: Close Combat
programme.desc: Weapons experts test the physical and psychological impact of close combat weapons - the Roman short sword, the medieval war hammer and the bayonet.

programme.title: Secret Wars Uncovered: A New Cold War
programme.desc: A New Cold War: How will the new Cold War, involving the US, Russia, the UK and China, play out? Will trade and cyber warfare be the worst of it or is military war inevitable?

programme.title: The Sound And The Fury
programme.desc: In the East, Hitler launches Operation Barbarossa and invades the Soviet Union, reaching the outskirts of Moscow. But winter and Soviet resistance break his momentum. The Red Army, boosted by relentless propaganda, put up a fierce fight.

programme.title: Secret Wars Uncovered: Russian Intervention In Georgia
programme.desc: Russian Intervention in Georgia: In 2008, nearly 850 people are killed in the Russo-Georgian War. How did it erupt and what is the current relationship between the two nations?

programme.title: History Of Weapons: Weapons For All
programme.desc: From the crossbow to the Kalashnikov to 3D-printed firearms, weaponry designed for everyone can offer a decisive advantage in warfare.

programme.title: Combat Ships
programme.desc: This episode tells stories about the secret world of naval deception and cloak and dagger missions. 1914, the yacht Asgard, manned by Erskine Childers, smuggled rifles into a fishing village to arm an Irish militia in their struggle for Home Rule.

programme.title: Wild Dog Island
programme.desc: It’s time to get closer to nature. Loved by all ages and stages, NatureTime is a free streaming channel that features compelling wildlife and nature stories from around the world.

programme.title: SMILING ELEPHANT
programme.desc: Observe the fragile and evolving friendship between humans and elephants.

programme.title: Attack And Defend
programme.desc: Africa’s top predators have evolved formidable means of surviving and thriving.

programme.title: Volcanic Odysseys
programme.desc: See how Japan copes with a volcanic crisis when an island is hit by eruption.

programme.title: Volcanic Odysseys
programme.desc: Learn about two volcanoes that threaten the people living in their paths.

programme.title: Secrets Of Wild Australia

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Imagine That!
programme.desc: While Baby Bop and BJ are pretending to be pirates, Barney creates a magical island for their fantastic adventure. Together they discover ways to have fun while playing dress up, pretending, and being silly.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends

programme.title: Barney and Friends: A Bird of a Different Feather

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Here Kitty, Kitty

programme.desc: When Riff meets a new friend in the park, BJ feels a little left out. BJ goes to great lengths to try to find a new friend for himself. Barney helps BJ see that we don't have to forget old friends when we make new ones.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Raphael Meets His Match
programme.desc: Billionaire McDonald Crump makes the smallest pizzas in the world, and gives the biggest parties.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Slash - The Evil Turtles from Dimension X
programme.desc: Using some of Shredder's and Krang's supercharged mutagen, Bebop and Rocksteady turn pet turtle Slash into an evil super mutant.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Leonardo Lightens Up

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Funny-They Shrunk Michelangelo

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Big Zipp Attack!
programme.desc: Intent on stealing the Lofty Tower's rigidium spire, Shredder lets a dreaded Zipp loose on the city as a tactical diversion.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Donatello Makes Time
programme.desc: Donatello's newest invention, the Time Stopper, has fallen into the hands of unconventional scientist Lloyd Cycloyd.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Farewell, Lotus Blossom
programme.desc: Using a devious deception, Shredder tricks Lotus Blossom into fighting the Turtles for possession of the burial urn of Chakahachi, an ancient Japanese magician.

programme.title: The Lady Vanishes
programme.desc: Alfred Hitchcock mixes suspense, comedy, witty dialog, and endearing character in this charming, classic mystery. When a kindly governess vanishes from a train, no one believes she even exists…except for one woman who sets about solving the mystery.

programme.title: 12 Angry Men
programme.desc: Eleven jurors are convinced that the defendant is guilty of murder. The twelfth has no doubt of his innocence. How can this one man steer the others toward the same conclusion? Henry Fonda and Lee J. Cobb lead the all-star cast in this classic!

programme.title: Elvira's Haunted Hills
programme.desc: ELVIRA'S HAUNTED HILLS culls its outragousness from the classic Vincent Price/Roger Corman films of the early 60's along with a little Rocky Horror Picture Show and Fearless Vampire Killers.

programme.title: Resistance
programme.desc: Based on the acclaimed novel. 1944: The D-Day landings have failed, and the German Wehrmacht has invaded Britain. The country is now under enemy occupation. In a remote valley in the Black Mountains of Wales, the women awake to discover the men are gone.

programme.title: Union Bound
programme.desc: Union Bound is a thrilling Civil War film that shows the strength and courage of the human spirit. Sergeant Joseph Hoover went to war to preserve the Union but finds himself captured and sent to a prisoner of war camp.

programme.title: Masters Of The Universe
programme.desc: The fantastic exploits of He-Man and his arch rival, the evil Skeletor, are brought to the big screen for the first time in this live-action adventure.

programme.title: Killer Infatuation
programme.desc: Mackenzie runs a killer-dedicated podcast with a large fan base. However, she begins living her own murder mystery, as she develops an infatuation with her impossibly attractive new neighbor, who was the prime suspect in a murder years ago.

programme.title: Mary Higgins Clark
programme.desc: Having the winning lottery jackpot ticket is the best thing that could have happened to delivery man Bill Regan. Determined to find out what happened, a friend retraces Bill's delivery stops and discovers they lead to her own husband.

programme.title: Vows of Deception
programme.desc: When a prominent lawyer is found murdered, his wife is promptly arrested and charged with the crime. She swiftly accuses her stepson, with whom she claims to be having an affair.

programme.title: Jumper
programme.desc: A man discovers that he possesses the ability to instantly teleport anywhere in the world.

programme.title: Native
programme.desc: Two scientists are selected to travel across the universe to the source of a distant transmission and potential life.

programme.title: Killer Klowns From Outer Space
programme.desc: One-of-a-kind alien invasion sci-fi featuring blood drinking alien clowns harvesting a small city.

programme.title: Area Q
programme.desc: After his son disappears a journalist goes to Brazil to investigate, where he discovers close encounter sightings that have taken place in a region known as Area Q, where he may uncover the mystery surrounding his son's disappearance.

programme.title: Timber Kings: Weather or Not
programme.desc: Peter battles the elements to build a retirement home for childhood sweethearts, while Bryan Jr. constructs an entryway for his own sweetheart - wife Tabby.

programme.title: Timber Kings: Hometown Hero
programme.desc: Beat creates a cozy cabin in Germany, while Peter and Sr. win a Guinness World Record with their jaw-dropping one-of-a-kind log car, and Joel takes on a difficult build made even tougher with a rookie slinging logs.

programme.title: Timber Kings: Heaven’s Gate
programme.desc: Bryan Jr. feels the heat to recreate the cozy log home a British Columbia couple lost to a fire. Meanwhile, Peter hopes for a ticket to heaven by building a covered entrway for the local church.

programme.title: Timber Kings: Under the Gun
programme.desc: While Beat constructs a luxury fishing lodge in northern British Columbia, Bryan Jr. is covered into giving the local gun shop a much-needed facelift.

programme.title: Timber Kings: Cowboy Confidential
programme.desc: Beat and Andre are lassoed into building an elaborate carved archway for the Williams Lake Stampede. Meanwhile, Joel wrangles a rookie crew to construct a vacation home in the wilds of Wisconsin.

programme.title: H.G. Wells' The Invisible Man: Death Cell
programme.desc: An escaped mental patient comes to Peter, asking for his help in getting her fiancͩ cleared of a murder charge as he awaits execution.

programme.title: H.G. Wells' The Invisible Man: The Vanishing Evidence
programme.desc: A European spy kills a British professor and steals vital papers. M.I.5 recruits Peter to go to to Amsterdam and recover the scientific research.

programme.title: H.G. Wells' The Invisible Man: The Prize
programme.desc: In Scandinavia, at a prize-awarding ceremony, Peter must rescue a writer being held for speaking out against her repressive government.

programme.title: H.G. Wells' The Invisible Man: Flight into Darkness
programme.desc: Dr. Stephens believes his anti-gravity research will endanger mankind; he destroys the papers and disappears. Brady is summoned to track him down.

programme.title: H.G. Wells' The Invisible Man: Decoy
programme.desc: Identical twins Toni and Terry Trent are a popular musical act, performing for the troops on a USO tour of Britain. Brady volunteers to help Toni when Terry disappears at a Soho hotel where she had earlier witnessed a murder.

programme.title: H.G. Wells' The Invisible Man: The White Rabbit
programme.desc: French authorities call Peter when a doctor brings in a white rabbit she says materialized out of thin air before her eyes.

programme.title: H.G. Wells' The Invisible Man: Man in Disguise
programme.desc: The Invisible man is investigating an international drug ring when his identity is stolen by a beautiful young woman and used to smuggle drugs.

programme.title: H.G. Wells' The Invisible Man: The Gun Runners
programme.desc: Terrorists in an Italian market gun down a family. This sparks an investigation into how the killers got the guns, which Peter is tasked with.

programme.title: H.G. Wells' The Invisible Man: Man in Power
programme.desc: Brady aids the heirs of a Middle East king, who has been murdered by his power-crazy army chief to regain their father's throne.

programme.title: Dark Waters of Crime: Mortal Passion

programme.title: The New Detectives: The Unforgotten

programme.title: The New Detectives: Camera Clues
programme.desc: Forensic Photography: Forensic photographers are among the first people at a crime scene, capturing vital clues on film. What do the cameras capture that can't be seen first-hand, and who are the men and women who analyze the camera's clues?

programme.title: The New Detectives: Marked For Death
programme.desc: Sometimes killers are careful to leave no fingerprints behind. But methods of the murder itself can leave a lasting impression on police, especially when the tools (or weapons) of a killer's trade leave an innocent victim marked for death.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Patterns Of Guilt

programme.desc: An unexpected late-winter thaw reveals a key piece of evidence that helps solve the murder of a beloved father of three.

programme.desc: In the first episode of a two-part season finale, Gloucester's reigning Bluefin champion Dave Carraro, of FV-tuna.com, starts the fishing season with a $20,000 lead over his rival.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Endgame
programme.desc: With only three days left in the North Atlantic Bluefin Tuna season, the captains of Gloucester race against each other - and an oncoming storm - in the battle to land their final fish of the season.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: The Wicked Return
programme.desc: The fishermen of Gloucester, Massachusetts, set out for Jeffrey's Ledge in hopes of catching the first fish of the North Atlantic Bluefin Tuna Season.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Checkmate
programme.desc: It's week two of the North Atlantic Blue Fin Tuna Season and the Gloucester captains and their crews, from rookies to old pros, get put to the test.

programme.title: Chopper Squad: Episode 8
programme.desc: The chopper crew races to save a woman with a rare disease who's in danger of suffocating from uncontrollable muscle spasms; a badly burnt toddler at Cooks Beach needs an urgent airlift to hospital.

programme.title: Chopper Squad: Episode 9
programme.desc: The chopper team is called out to save a pilot who's trapped in the wreck of his hang glider and a diabetic bus driver is found seriously ill after four days lying on his floor.

programme.title: Chopper Squad: Episode 10
programme.desc: The Rescue 1 team are en route to the scene of a horrific accident. A pedestrian has been hit by a truck and is in a critical condition.

programme.title: Chopper Squad: Episode 11
programme.desc: A woman is badly hurt after being knocked down a bank by her pet goat, a man is found with serious injuries on a remote beach, and 11-year old girl has fallen down a bank and suffered suspected spinal damage.

programme.title: Chopper Squad: Episode 12
programme.desc: The chopper team is called out to save a motorbike racer who's crashed at 200ks per hour and a woman scalded by an exploding radiator, plus an elderly golfer in a kilt suffers a heart attack on the 18th hole.

programme.title: Chopper Squad: Episode 13
programme.desc: A 39 year old man has crashed his bike 15 kilometres south of Auckland city and an elderly man has collapsed while walking. He is unable to speak properly and is incorreherent at Waiheke Island.

programme.title: Chopper Squad: Episode 1
programme.desc: The Rescue 1 chopper team struggle to save a Paeroa farmer.

programme.title: Chopper Squad: Episode 2
programme.desc: Tropical rain has hit Wellsford, flooding the entire town and leaving a pregnant woman and her unborn child fighting for their lives.

programme.title: Chopper Squad: Episode 4
programme.desc: A Glenbrook farmer has been left seriously injured after one of his Highland cows has taken to him with its horns.

programme.title: Chopper Squad: Episode 5
programme.desc: The team are being sent out to a traumatic accident that will end up being rather close to home.

programme.title: Chopper Squad: Episode 6
programme.desc: The Rescue chopper team is en route to Whitianga to help save a badly injured stock car driver.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: A rare 1968 Honda N600 car emerges from a lock-up in County Durham and Derek travels Scotland to collect an original RAC Bedford van.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Derek collects five beautiful veteran motorbikes from an enthusiast who's still happily riding in his 90s.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: A rare and much-loved 1964 Ford Capri Consul coupe comes up for auction. Paul takes a 1957 Leyland Comet truck for a spin, and Dave admits that high on his wish-list is a Citroën 2CV.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash: Live
programme.desc: Highlights of a special event featuring an in-person auction. Derek and Dave aim to get the right price for a 1958 Jaguar XK 150, and there's a bidding war for a 1975 Yamaha Fizzy.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: A vivid Dutch DAF 66 - in daffodil yellow - lands at the North Yorkshire showroom.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Paul heads out to collect a 1971 Jaguar E-Type and a 1933 Morgan three-wheeler Supersport. Before he can negotiate a flock of chickens.

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance
programme.desc: Hard-working ambulance crews help a young woman who fell down a flight of stairs and a shivering pensioner with possible sepsis, as well as a sparky 95-year-old who's had a fall.

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance
programme.desc: On shift with West Midlands Ambulance Service who treat a young lad with a fever, a golf-loving pensioner with a heart problem and a woman convinced she has lung cancer.

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance
programme.desc: An asthmatic deteriorates rapidly in the ambulance, and the crews are called to a 30-year-old car that's been driven into a wall by a 90-year-old driver.

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance
programme.desc: The West Midlands crews treat a pensioner whose heart rate is so erratic they are worried he might have a heart attack on the way to the hospital.

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance
programme.desc: The paramedics treat a woman whose legs have dramatically swollen, a girl having panic attacks, and a very ill and unconscious man.

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance
programme.desc: The crews attend a HGV driver suffering dizzy spells and a woman who has fallen into a bush. They also move a man with a spinal injury who has no sensation from the neck down.

programme.title: The Maury Show: I'm 27…Is My Teen Boyfriend Cheating?
programme.desc: Rachelle believes that her man Chris may be cheating with as many as 50 women, including her sister! Then, Carrie was shocked when she found out that her man Chris lied about his military service.

programme.title: The Maury Show: I Don't Want To Meet Your Baby!
programme.desc: Kyle denies that he fathered Citasia’s child. His mom says that he’s lying. Then, Josh fathered five kids. Dana says that he better prepare for number six because she claims he’s the father of her baby!

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Maury says “You ARE the father!” But are those the words the nervous, alleged fathers want to hear? Or will “You are NOT the father” send the moms into shock? Find out the results on today’s MAURY!

programme.title: The Maury Show: Beware! Hidden Dangers Caught on Tape
programme.desc: On this special edition of The Maury Show, Maury brings celebrity guests to the stage to share some of the most intense and shocking real-life footage ever caught on tape.

programme.title: The Maury Show: You Texted Nude Photos, Cheater!
programme.desc: After months of begging and pleading, Latoya forgave Justice for cheating. But now they’re back to test him for the same thing! Then, James could be too good to be true – is he cheating on Santa? What will the lie detector tests say?

programme.title: The Maury Show: Who's Lying? Take The Test!
programme.desc: Cheaters, cheaters and more cheaters! Today’s MAURY is full of drama, shock and temptation. These guests simply can’t keep their hands to themselves when faced with a tempting situation and find themselves in deep trouble with their partners!

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 19
programme.desc: Jim and Steve face one of their riskiest recoveries when a tanker carrying highly corrosive pure sulphuric acid smashes into the central reservation of a busy A road and overturns.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 20
